subject: Asking for a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
We have an important FEC fundraising deadline on June 30. Shortly after, we are legally required to report our numbers and everyone will be able to see how much money our U.S. Senate campaign has raised so far. Hello — We are writing to ask you to **[make a contribution to help us defeat Republican Senator Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691580/351354861/584544606?refcode=em22_220618_explain_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220618_explain_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ3NDMzNy02NGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7jjZYImfzdBabKNtotC3V1ggtoom4xrrkZ6cZfwmlQ=)** Please let us explain why this request is so important ahead of our FEC deadline on June 30. Our race is the best opportunity Democrats have at flipping a Republican-held seat and expanding our 50/50 Senate majority, but it’s going to take a lot of resources to win. Republicans have already reserved $24 million in Wisconsin to protect Ron Johnson, who is without a doubt the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election. They've got over $200 million to take back the Senate and Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC is reportedly planning to spend more than $141 million in order to do it. Sarah Godlewski is the strongest Democrat to take them all on and win. She’s the only one polling ahead of Ron Johnson right now, and _The Washington Post_ considers her “the best chance” to defeat him in November. Election experts consider our race a dead heat, but Sarah represents the Democrats' *single best shot* to flip this seat. So, when this deadline ends, we have to make some critical budget decisions that will put us in an even stronger position to replace Ron Johnson in the Senate. That’s why we’re HUMBLY asking: **[Will you contribute any amount to Sarah Godlewski's campaign before our FEC deadline on June 30? It all adds up when everyone is pitching in — that’s how we defeat Ron Johnson to win this toss-up Senate race. Thanks in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691581/351354862/584544606?refcode=em22_220618_explain_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220618_explain_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ3NDMzNy02NGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7jjZYImfzdBabKNtotC3V1ggtoom4xrrkZ6cZfwmlQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691582/351354863/584544606?refcode=em22_220618_explain_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220618_explain_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ3NDMzNy02NGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7jjZYImfzdBabKNtotC3V1ggtoom4xrrkZ6cZfwmlQ=)

June 18, 2022
\----FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

SHERWOOD CALLS FOR GOVERNOR STITT TO WITHDRAW FROM THE 2022 ELECTION
(TULSA, OKLAHOMA June 18, 2022) Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Dr. Mark Sherwood

A VOTE FOR KEVIN STITT MAY ENSURE A DEMOCRAT GOVERNOR FOR THE STATE OF OKLAHOMA.

In light of the recent alleged illegal actions of Governor Stitts Campaign, I, Dr. Mark Sherwood, 2022 Republican Gubernatorial Candidate, am calling on Kevin Stitt to consider stepping down from the gubernatorial race immediately in order to save our State from being led by Joy Hofmeister, the Democrat Candidate.

Oklahomans are aware of the pay-to-play investigation regarding the Oklahoma Tourism Department and Stitt's friends, Swadley's BBQ.

Additionally, audits have exposed 5.4 million dollars spent on goods that were never received. Further, under the direction of Kevin Stitt, another internal State auditor was fired after looking into concerns about a conflict of interest.

[https://www.pressreader.com/usa/the-oklahoman-sunday/20220417/281487869894809](https://www.sherwood2022.com/so/e8O5vGaM4/c?w=fraO-7zi5h6Ec0S3vBQOMPHSN7qBdrZbpAtLosHAAus.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJlc3NyZWFkZXIuY29tL3VzYS90aGUtb2tsYWhvbWFuLXN1bmRheS8yMDIyMDQxNy8yODE0ODc4Njk4OTQ4MDkiLCJyIjoiZGYzYzM4NjctY2VmZS00ZDlkLTc0OTAtOGI4YWU4ZWE1Zjc1IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiM2Q0YzZiN2QtMTZmYy00OWJlLTgwNGMtZDdlOWUyNzNmNDMzIn0)

[https://w](https://www.sherwood2022.com/so/e8O5vGaM4/c?w=RZFzMwkH7yRZHEK1zdKdB-844jigDieDlA8BOP02m9Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVhZGZyb250aWVyLm9yZy9zdG9yaWVzL2Etc3BlY2lhbC1ob3VzZS1jb21taXR0ZWUtd2lsbC1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0ZS10aGUtc3dhZGxleXMtZm9nZ3ktYm90dG9tLWtpdGNoZW4tZGVhbC8iLCJyIjoiZGYzYzM4NjctY2VmZS00ZDlkLTc0OTAtOGI4YWU4ZWE1Zjc1IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiM2Q0YzZiN2QtMTZmYy00OWJlLTgwNGMtZDdlOWUyNzNmNDMzIn0)[ww.readfrontier.org/stories/a-special-house-committee-will-investigate-the-swadleys-foggy-bottom-kitchen-deal/](https://www.sherwood2022.com/so/e8O5vGaM4/c?w=RZFzMwkH7yRZHEK1zdKdB-844jigDieDlA8BOP02m9Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVhZGZyb250aWVyLm9yZy9zdG9yaWVzL2Etc3BlY2lhbC1ob3VzZS1jb21taXR0ZWUtd2lsbC1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0ZS10aGUtc3dhZGxleXMtZm9nZ3ktYm90dG9tLWtpdGNoZW4tZGVhbC8iLCJyIjoiZGYzYzM4NjctY2VmZS00ZDlkLTc0OTAtOGI4YWU4ZWE1Zjc1IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiM2Q0YzZiN2QtMTZmYy00OWJlLTgwNGMtZDdlOWUyNzNmNDMzIn0)

But now, the biggest Stitt debacle of all could have felony-level ramifications. Stitt just launched what may be an illegal campaign ad on behalf of John O'Conner, a candidate for State Attorney General and Stitt's personal pal.

[https://www.newson6.com/story/629fd513a50ac10728baaac7/district-attorney-investigating-stitt-campaign-ad-after-lawmakers-complain-of-ethics-violations--](https://www.sherwood2022.com/so/e8O5vGaM4/c?w=zOKAc2XuxmRRZUGjRFCcba6oerR9cToHZCW8gZ0WRr0.)

[https://www.tahlequahdailypress.com/news/oklahoma-watch-stitt-s-oklahoma-turnaround-ads-may-violate-ethics-rules/article_ede7a772-e8fc-11ec-9f7b-47aed5cf6eaf.html](https://www.sherwood2022.com/so/e8O5vGaM4/c?w=plK5mpgdg88Sh7OAiV3SWWvkXyXO2YB4L2PnlYH6qUI.)

Oklahoma lawmakers have written, “The intent is clear: with his hand-picked Attorney General lagging in the polls, Governor Stitt is spending his campaign funds to help.”

Oklahoma County District Attorney David Prater has stated, “ I consider this a serious matter,...I will respect the lawmakers' request and investigate..." If the allegations are true, Stitt could be found guilty of a felony punishable by a massive fine and/or imprisonment of up to a year.

Title 21 Oklahoma Statutes Section-21-187-1/E.: “Any person who knowingly and willfully violates any provision of this section where the aggregate amount contributed exceeds the contribution limitation specified in subsection A of this section by Five Thousand Dollars ($5,000.00) or more, upon conviction, shall be guilty of a felony punishable by a fine of up to four times the amount exceeding the contribution limitation or by imprisonment in the State Penitentiary for up to one (1) year, or by both such fine and imprisonment.”

If Stitt is elected as the Republican nominee, there is a possibility that he could be criminally charged and disqualified as a candidate. This will leave us forced to elect a Democrat as governor of Oklahoma, who will most assuredly be a puppet for the globalists and communists running D.C.

At a time when our State is under threats from enemies without and within, the republican primary on June 28 could decide the fate of Oklahoma. We need a governor who will secure Oklahoma's freedom as a sovereign State and push against the tyrants in D.C.! If we nominate Kevin Stitt, we could be setting the stage for an unopposed Democratic victory in the general election. Do we want the Party of Clinton, Obama, and Biden to govern in Oklahoma?

Based on this unscrupulous pattern of behavior, I believe Kevin Stitt should step aside as a candidate for the 2022 Gubernatorial election in order to save Oklahoma from falling into the hands of Democrats.

Together I truly believe we can make Oklahoma the freest State in the Union.

Dr. Mark Sherwood 2022 Oklahoma Gubernatorial Candidate

clean_body: Contact Information: Dr. Mark Sherwood, 2022 Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Release Date: June 18, 2022 ----FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SHERWO | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | PRESS RELEASE | | | | | Contact Information: Dr. Mark Sherwood, 2022 Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Release Date: June 18, 2022 \----FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SHERWOOD CALLS FOR GOVERNOR STITT TO WITHDRAW FROM THE 2022 ELECTION (TULSA, OKLAHOMA June 18, 2022) Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Dr. Mark Sherwood A VOTE FOR KEVIN STITT MAY ENSURE A DEMOCRAT GOVERNOR FOR THE STATE OF OKLAHOMA. In light of the recent alleged illegal actions of Governor Stitts Campaign, I, Dr. Mark Sherwood, 2022 Republican Gubernatorial Candidate, am calling on Kevin Stitt to consider stepping down from the gubernatorial race immediately in order to save our State from being led by Joy Hofmeister, the Democrat Candidate. Oklahomans are aware of the pay-to-play investigation regarding the Oklahoma Tourism Department and Stitt's friends, Swadley's BBQ. Additionally, audits have exposed 5.4 million dollars spent on goods that were never received. Further, under the direction of Kevin Stitt, another internal State auditor was fired after looking into concerns about a conflict of interest. But now, the biggest Stitt debacle of all could have felony-level ramifications. Stitt just launched what may be an illegal campaign ad on behalf of John O'Conner, a candidate for State Attorney General and Stitt's personal pal. Oklahoma lawmakers have written, “The intent is clear: with his hand-picked Attorney General lagging in the polls, Governor Stitt is spending his campaign funds to help.” Oklahoma County District Attorney David Prater has stated, “ I consider this a serious matter,...I will respect the lawmakers' request and investigate..." If the allegations are true, Stitt could be found guilty of a felony punishable by a massive fine and/or imprisonment of up to a year. Title 21 Oklahoma Statutes Section-21-187-1/E.: “Any person who knowingly and willfully violates any provision of this section where the aggregate amount contributed exceeds the contribution limitation specified in subsection A of this section by Five Thousand Dollars ($5,000.00) or more, upon conviction, shall be guilty of a felony punishable by a fine of up to four times the amount exceeding the contribution limitation or by imprisonment in the State Penitentiary for up to one (1) year, or by both such fine and imprisonment.” If Stitt is elected as the Republican nominee, there is a possibility that he could be criminally charged and disqualified as a candidate. This will leave us forced to elect a Democrat as governor of Oklahoma, who will most assuredly be a puppet for the globalists and communists running D.C. At a time when our State is under threats from enemies without and within, the republican primary on June 28 could decide the fate of Oklahoma. We need a governor who will secure Oklahoma's freedom as a sovereign State and push against the tyrants in D.C.! If we nominate Kevin Stitt, we could be setting the stage for an unopposed Democratic victory in the general election. Do we want the Party of Clinton, Obama, and Biden to govern in Oklahoma? Based on this unscrupulous pattern of behavior, I believe Kevin Stitt should step aside as a candidate for the 2022 Gubernatorial election in order to save Oklahoma from falling into the hands of Democrats. Together I truly believe we can make Oklahoma the freest State in the Union. Dr. Mark Sherwood 2022 Oklahoma Gubernatorial Candidate | | | | | | | | This is a team effort and we need your help! Prayerfully consider joining the movement to take back Oklahoma by volunteering or partnering with us financially. We also need your help to get the message out, if we can get our app, Sherwood22 into the hands of 10k patriot citizens in Oklahoma, we will win this seat! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr92aguvbqpu00ntn41v28ee4lrea35kukoi8o9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o76c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3m6uoectjh68pb4stlm5gb0t70c8ojadbjcoo67c70cqp70p1jcji7dd3i6arrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3aphh6apm2ptncdj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd4er8gh4mnvv7gtd0vbafbqgobov6svv54dtmu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o76c9h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu67jmu56bo542sbals5iujndqmsn63s44t6jmj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o76c9h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1l67jot7k291l8ok55a6gspps0540qvp5ih1c9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o76c9h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Shame on these Communist Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
I've made a special video for you to watch why I'm leading the fight to STOP Joe Biden's gun control.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb8v4i0ckfhlufodtdi8ffhs0a1ougp2n7b6d0f8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjcpie0pb36qqm3cdgeurb0t356opndc72eli31o5ncphr6cb66jjj8dbncmq3fduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74db664pb6ob7mth6cc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcv6fccotgdnh7hkusa6jht41agr3t87phr5pc78_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cph2bs)

Fellow Patriot,

Frankly, **I 'm disgusted.**

Oh, I expected I would be attacked like this. But using the deaths of children to score political points?

That's just beyond the pale even for Joe Biden.

I've made a special video for you to watch why I'm leading the fight to STOP Joe Biden's gun control.

**Shame on the Communist Democrats and Joe Biden for attacking the Constitution and putting our children in danger.**

But that is exactly what Joe Biden, and the radical left are doing to try and gut the 2nd amendment.

And it's what my radical leftist Democrat opponent is claiming will "put him over the top this November."

**So please [watch my video](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znhb7a8fj43084q245fpp5erdiuihoft7p73p10o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cph2bs) explaining why I'm leading the fight to stop Joe Biden from banning and confiscating firearms from American citizens.**

_[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z41iee57o4oleo62t2lgpdbv8oihbvafjp73gm28_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cph2bs)_
**[HELP MTG FIGHT BACK
DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3jeccssvhfucbsf8mmg7amfb2rn6rl241m3ubc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cph2bs)**
****I had to spend everything I had fighting attempts to kick me off the ballot, paying legal fees, and running a campaign against a RINO primary opponent.****

I simply MUST begin rebuilding my campaign funds to be able to defeat my Democrat opponent this fall.

And I know you agree with me that the stakes are simply too high to give up now.

I've already got a huge target on my back.

****My leftist opponent has already raised $8 million - and he raised that before the Democrats thought he had a chance.****

Now that these shootings have the Democrats all excited and thinking they have a winning issue, I expect him to double - or even TRIPLE that amount.

That's why it's absolutely vital I have your support now so I can replenish my campaign funds right away.

I don't expect to match him dollar for dollar, but I don't need to.

****With your help, I can raise enough to run my hard-hitting ads, put out my targeted direct mail, and get the winning America First message out throughout Georgia 's 14th district.****

So won't you please help me fight back TODAY?

****[Can I count on you to help rebuild our war chest with an emergency post-primary donation of $250, $100, $50, $25, or $15 today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhi8coirhm83if9sva9r0q91235tqldeck070he0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cph2bs)****

I simply can't do this alone.
**[SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT
CHIP IN TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0nssgg5187bivh98h8kuv5c8l24962k5rmm3alo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cph2bs)**

Yours in the fight,

**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
Congresswoman (R-GA)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znfs4ldfnsnibm3vn4hcdrml8o95hol4q205r1hg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cph2bs)

**_Paid for by Greene for Congress. _**

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq14ltvs9qe5h5sef01vlcru814l2pismqgcdfs8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongm9qe6or2epor6dbiecpb1d3n65pn8p30c1qe8c77m1ib1pr6epj78ddncgqmeduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdkmmpm0slicor61cr4suobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cjh2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4klqkqbbk5i5d2c9frbba0p96bdcbctuc7hqq5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cjh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6qc9j9dp65odokc6fb7nv24s9tij023vb55vnk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cjh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhp4mfgqohsg7d6kcp9eqq57u8nnk05e0oh7peng_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72cjh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Ryan Kelley for Governor
subject: FBI Notice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michigan for Ryan D
body:
You read that right. The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. This is face of tyranny and government overreach.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaem0ikig711h1c0hdt1l291imov7597ifruuqe8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbojedr26lgmasdjchim5d74edj7cs71mdrb0tljehhn8dj1m2pr4sjlcpq30otgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666qbbcr0eap6cdj0mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clim6pj2c3h62oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaflvohjfhl00u9i21crqphps2ck5nvfej3v7aa8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72c5h2bs)
---
| | Friend, The FBI just showed up. You read that right. _**The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. **_ This is face of tyranny and government overreach. Anyone who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life fighting against this exact oppression. But let me back up. My name is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was splashed across every news outlet in the country. Thats ok. The media and the establishment swamp have tried to pretend I don't exist, but I am now leading in the polls to be the Republican nominee for Governor in Michigan. **That's right. Governor. In Michigan. A state where election fraud happened and Trump's victory was stolen...and Biden's DOJ just had me arrested. ** I started this campaign for a simple reason. The government's grip on the throat of its citizenry has grown so tight as to make our republic unrecognizable. When the COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and "rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I stood up. I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in Biden's America. _I will never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either. _ There is a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it. We beat them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep state operative _**will ever, ever forget the consequence of oppressing the will of the people**_ and attempting to steal our God-given rights. _I need_ _your_ _help_. [I need you to make a donation right now and help me fight back. I have no intention of letting up now. ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1hjhejk2a4aiecaaob6a148vqd4dd6erp1u5f9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72c5h2bs) That they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history. A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights. You've probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but you're getting one now. The question is: _What will you do next?_ Will you delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first amendment rights next? Or will you [click the link, make a donation, and be part of the true grassroots movement that is building here](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn95rch5ds5sbo47nt0lb8ejlh9m84j8i7tvd898_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj64o72c5h2bs)? I've made it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can. **They want us silent. They want us on our knees.** Stand up. Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time.
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The future of the American Dream
body:
We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z51nqn98j600214l2tret5aeatpa1rgv5no5sfc0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u4rrcttk6li6colgseob4ddietib9p9iehjr4pr5mljr0p5iepr66dpi66qrdc37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmiqr6o3imhj32cljcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5clhmcob3cpj649fg)

---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach—especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdcc75s67v61jbucdq8h3eggfq8rkmllbonb04g0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj62or6cph2bs)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: **[https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlh9q5r7u0d8jjjerui176eq7vv00t5d4156cm1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj62or6cph2bs)** Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. McIndoe [**QUESTION 1: Do you believe the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory are destroying the American education system?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7gi0ilvv604qo71np9km12pjg3ierifs0n9q67g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdj62or6cph2bs)

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
June 19, 2022 | Issue XXI
---
| |
---
|
# Happy Father's Day
---
| On this special day, we recognize every dad, grandfather, fatherly figure, and the important roles they play in our lives.
Through attitude, words, and actions, a father helps mold us into the people we are today.
I am very thankful that my dad taught me the important principles of integrity, patience, hard work, serving and showing kindness to others.
From me and my father, to you and yours, Happy Father's Day.
---
|
---
| |
### Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt
On Governor Hochul Extending the Disaster Emergency in the State of New York Tuesday, June 14, 2022
Enough is enough. End the state of emergency immediately.
###
---
| [VIEW STATEMENT ONLINE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3c1sPaBbOnK3TM0HduPdL-A2_2DXi8Tkj3F2UTe-hHY-ciWmrUO0lkNmB2YKHYaCb83sCD7gWDg1Cj0Ue44HUjqxQOe0q09yXFRkBe7WE9GwLounO39by4tKovvg_YIlKToyst4oTwak05jXQgBoxUYwA1hQ935HZI&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==)

| [Most New Yorkers are very concerned about crime in our state](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3cb0d_5eG8ZzIoYhTqMEASVApvcgLP-TcxchU7KdJG_OA-bvAsRN9_g891IIiTeo4FtDSwdbzq2bh1pnG2ltpZo7YEcV0Z5QnHnhN5hc_a7HoU-CNQmu2RZaj1X00BnC688XEjQPPlIuRR2m4s5wbAoWbjoBRJaeWObGioSZ5SEoU2f8eJo34bKlIlUl4ClQ4qFPoAqS62_h88rVA4z8dWhxsm2e2_FvSXXuV2lPJkaV-hpa3ez6YazRNYeb_Y9IW_Q1CQJydpXXPixdB296WHvDy8HTgeOaUr-RKy0SWR5c2kfHnvYT7FJvqyifv2acqI5njPCYfN8Sugx55jP4woCAxU_rGQLuQZ&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==), and worried they could become a victim themselves.
NO New Yorker should ever feel unsafe in their homes, neighborhoods, and local communities.
One-Party-Rule has placed the interests of dangerous criminals above the rights of everyone else, including crime victims, law-abiding citizens, and the dedicated law enforcement professionals who keep our communities safe.
The results are painfully clear, and New Yorkers have had enough.
ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time to restore common sense & public safety to NY. [Join the movement:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3cWogBJyZq0YmmVKDLZ4SmdVT6voDLa77HzXejpR03UV7HkOXo9lEtuvEY3ukZJznsHzqp_nB8J98qVXHNEoV6i5ILCKDFt1Gcd5fwoKhwCAC4ufWSvMcLUzxgP4ygHLF6TwXuivFUHxg=&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==)

### IMPORTANT REMINDER On the Sate's Energy Plan: We need your input!
---
---
New York's Climate Action Council has extended the deadline for public comments on the state's [Draft Scoping Plan](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3cIQVusDMIsAUA4a8WPqxW0wcv9t_Y1XgAGat-PirDKMqMSekYamqJ9tWjIEiV5vXOXV307fEiC2GhqU85lcEdfn_9iW80T4Ig9scfzrJ1FEv5DtmdVzi7RW6edSrwIhvU&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==). This policy would affect all newly built homes and businesses, completely altering the state's energy plan.
The draft scoping plan, which is absent of any definitive cost, will eventually put an end to gas services in buildings, natural gas appliances for home heating, cooking, water heating, clothes drying, and gasoline-automobile sales - among many other policies.
Join over 18,000 New Yorkers by submitting your comment below.
---
| [SUBMIT YOUR COMMENT HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3cAKk3BpSYQkH_vkd67n5XzCnTRDHgRZLkYELkN7D666okd5ozh3dGsT_yAotbvIoEL3D18kEUOAWtC1YS4a0mxTO21h39engvUdmYvKm5N_4-FPrS5acCfQjPqpTtT-gE&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==)

| |
---
|
### Celebrating Flag Day

On Flag Day, we honored what the United States flag represents and celebrated the approval of our first national flag design in 1777.
May we always remember our men and women who have served our country, fighting for the freedom that allows us to fly our flag proudly today.
---
|
---
|
### Honoring our Police & Firefighters
---
|
---
| This week in Monroe County, Senator Rob Ortt had the privilege of honoring both our Police and Firefighters for their heroic actions in our community.
At the Ogden Police Department, Chief Christopher Mears, Sergeant David Marcucci, Investigator Robert Tygart, and Officer Jared Dent were presented with NYS Senate Proclamations for each of their life saving actions while serving.
Senator Ortt also had the honor of presenting Deputy Chief Jose Medina with a NYS Senate Proclamation for his bravery serving at the Brockport Fire Department.
---
|
---
| |
---
|
### Happy Birthday, U.S. Army!

This week marked 247 years that the United States Army has served our nation on the frontlines and defended our freedom and liberty.
"I am blessed to have served alongside so many great men and women during my time in the Army," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.
---
| |
---
|
### Ribbon Cutting for Lifetime Assistance Inc.'s 'Independence Together' Initiative

An exciting day on Tuesday for Lifetime Assistance Inc and the Brockport community with the opening of the Lowry Center's new 6,800 sq. ft addition. The space was renovated and expanded by nearly 50 percent.
As a part of Lifetime Assistance Inc's 'Independence Together' initiative, the completion of this project will expand and improve how services are provided to individuals with developmental disabilities.
[Learn More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3c-_iivm02wsMzFIEhG2JRFfB18X_gdFbazjn0Qby4hRgS-H6BWxHdo-Qx3WXhEmxJAgku4LcTg_8hC5S-FWvMYWqk9xvY6I-6&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==)
---
|
---
| |
### Honoring Officer Denny Wright

This week, Senator Rob Ortt had the honor of presenting Officer Denny Wright with a NYS Legislative Resolution for his heroic actions in our community. He has displayed his commitment to the Rochester community and[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3cWO4zE_6o2lylLuG96KtXjfjWtvpb5SEcGmzYrsNG-NqQNuTidgfSLklajWhpfEY3WqNUgEoPp-CNu6vqKvR3x3pfdW_b_1ZdJ5pBCmDaEWaaxnyEXAYeRmL2nV9LFm7GyZ8hR3YpSv7a7MlKyh1kOB0ZKWpVa_plJzKYn6CndaWmE4MJRVGdCCfRxoal7V7kiuqaL3dogVkTOvhqvUQVMQlokjaCLIR8SKxeS7Q-AP-NJNO5crw7kUJuHqJgJC90ktr0TGzW-mV8eS950EbdDQ-0wgT5_QIQzyt2t4QGKVBj9qmx97RFBmvK4vI7JzQoGQ7X7JaNJlJolJfPdYqJQJbmxj81PDosFf-oYBSNOv02rhucMerpF0Nr_QKU0YkbZHH9VFsjc78Bl4hOm9qrjA==&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==)[Rochester Police Department](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3cWO4zE_6o2lylLuG96KtXjfjWtvpb5SEcGmzYrsNG-NqQNuTidgfSLklajWhpfEY3WqNUgEoPp-CNu6vqKvR3x3pfdW_b_1ZdJ5pBCmDaEWaaxnyEXAYeRmL2nV9LFm7GyZ8hR3YpSv7a7MlKyh1kOB0ZKWpVa_plJzKYn6CndaWmE4MJRVGdCCfRxoal7V7kiuqaL3dogVkTOvhqvUQVMQlokjaCLIR8SKxeS7Q-AP-NJNO5crw7kUJuHqJgJC90ktr0TGzW-mV8eS950EbdDQ-0wgT5_QIQzyt2t4QGKVBj9qmx97RFBmvK4vI7JzQoGQ7X7JaNJlJolJfPdYqJQJbmxj81PDosFf-oYBSNOv02rhucMerpF0Nr_QKU0YkbZHH9VFsjc78Bl4hOm9qrjA==&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==) through his attitude, service, and perseverance.
New Yorkers are truly grateful for his service to our community.
[Read the story on this here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZzDPtF0fQWqONEYE2TZqZtwe7DYD6dh0LRlu1hrZ7_udKQ0Sm91guRbV--Go3cgRAtMuBH66PiLmImkcBNOUn_r8Y-YtvAJYOmytM0sR7qX3zZ7MyNQ0QqtiSplcatqxiB1dxLievJdbZJ7zcA4GDWUgFYmfFFX4uIAaEoONWJW-p3huaXPGnxXNnu3gOGgFIqzsMkskHGDvMGN0RH6IZI-D7evEH3t6UFVDjA34jGWvCodasfP2m2Gh8eCfu2uSiu5d96yiriI5OwFoR00qReei23aD2qF9Uc9CAh5yIoWYNSTqHOQccmqt-dISRtcbJ0mtzcpHgo_tSaL3p590mPbJyqUnzzfphauX1zxKQ4-Qtoplmzn-t3cTBgWUgQKyofjKHrAQL7hrc48Fd_aJuSzQP0pr78&c=3PA9exQ-TEY_IPyDVWs5koEz9ACjD0u6cMsnbQ8FF1OW6_NyWQ7M5w==&ch=YEkV59xjMVxfGoZbyW4eTpDB-55hz2CdOEZBDxfGzXBlqxmTARRFXA==)
---
| |
---
|
### Tenth Anniversary of the Historic Walk Over Niagara Falls

On Wednesday, Senator Rob Ortt joined Mayor Restaino in commemorating the tenth anniversary of Nik Wallenda's historic walk over Niagara Falls.
An exciting announcement was also shared of the "Sculpture in the Sky," in honor of the tenth anniversary.
---
|
---
| |
---

May we always remember our men and women who have served our country, fighting for the freedom that allows us to fly our flag proudly today. | | Honoring our Police & Firefighters | | This week in Monroe County, Senator Rob Ortt had the privilege of honoring both our Police and Firefighters for their heroic actions in our community. At the Ogden Police Department, Chief Christopher Mears, Sergeant David Marcucci, Investigator Robert Tygart, and Officer Jared Dent were presented with NYS Senate Proclamations for each of their life saving actions while serving. Senator Ortt also had the honor of presenting Deputy Chief Jose Medina with a NYS Senate Proclamation for his bravery serving at the Brockport Fire Department. | | | | Happy Birthday, U.S. Army! This week marked 247 years that the United States Army has served our nation on the frontlines and defended our freedom and liberty. "I am blessed to have served alongside so many great men and women during my time in the Army," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt. | | | Ribbon Cutting for Lifetime Assistance Inc.'s 'Independence Together' Initiative An exciting day on Tuesday for Lifetime Assistance Inc and the Brockport community with the opening of the Lowry Center's new 6,800 sq. ft addition. The space was renovated and expanded by nearly 50 percent. As a part of Lifetime Assistance Inc's 'Independence Together' initiative, the completion of this project will expand and improve how services are provided to individuals with developmental disabilities. == | | | Honoring Officer Denny Wright This week, Senator Rob Ortt had the honor of presenting Officer Denny Wright with a NYS Legislative Resolution for his heroic actions in our community. He has displayed his commitment to the Rochester community and== through his attitude, service, and perseverance. New Yorkers are truly grateful for his service to our community. == | | | Tenth Anniversary of the Historic Walk Over Niagara Falls On Wednesday, Senator Rob Ortt joined Mayor Restaino in commemorating the tenth anniversary of Nik Wallenda's historic walk over Niagara Falls. An exciting announcement was also shared of the "Sculpture in the Sky," in honor of the tenth anniversary. | | | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: == == == | | == | | | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with

name: Unite the Country
subject: Today, we celebrate Black perseverance, achievement, and freedom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46693777/351383715/-1342252043?refcode=utc_em_logoT_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwY2VmNjU3LWM3ZWYtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JMTr80JW5S4Urb7BGn2Ulhy0NwkFiuLfZhVEQBuKXcg=) As you may know, last year, President Biden signed a bill establishing Juneteenth as a federal holiday to celebrate the official end of slavery in the United States. On June 19, 1865, two and a half years after President Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation, Union soldiers landed in Galveston, Texas with news that the formerly enslaved were free. Today, we celebrate the meaning of this important day while also recognizing this country’s ability to change — to fight systemic racism, white supremacy, and hate. And together, we can continue to pave the road to real and lasting justice, so that we may finally become the great nation that was promised to all Americans. We hope this day serves as a call to action, and we’ll be right by your side on the road toward lasting change. In solidarity, Unite the Country
---
* * *
Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment.

Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
For only the second year ever, Juneteenth is an official federal holiday. But of course, its history traces back much further. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46694158/351384851/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZZ_HOL_E_20220619_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmNlZjY1Ny1jN2VmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6jZIaE8ZC4lDxl9O3RmpQ_v6mDgOX9bCbTKH6Q6jqDs=&emci=0f660972-32ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=12cef657-c7ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
For only the second year ever, Juneteenth is an official federal holiday. But of course, its history traces back much further. On June 19, 1865 — 157 years ago today — Union soldiers arrived in Galveston, Texas and declared that slavery was finally over. The formerly enslaved people of Galveston erupted in joy. Ever since, today has been known as Juneteenth: the annual and oldest known celebration commemorating the end of slavery in the United States. I’m very happy that Juneteenth has finally received the official recognition it deserves. It’s a chance to tell the story of how even in the face of oppression, Black Americans throughout our history have never stopped imagining and fighting for a better tomorrow. Not just for themselves, but for our entire nation. Of course, it isn’t enough to get together and celebrate how far we’ve come. We have to get together and see what more we need to do. Just look back at the history: On that first Juneteenth, it had been over two years since President Lincoln had signed the Emancipation Proclamation — but freedom on paper doesn’t always mean freedom in practice. And that’s certainly still true now. Today, we have to recommit ourselves to rooting out systemic racism in every aspect of our economy and society. We have to confront white supremacy in all of its forms. We have to cement the unshakeable truth that Black lives matter. So if you’re in the middle of a long weekend for Juneteenth, and if you weren’t otherwise planning on it, I want to encourage you to meaningfully recognize this holiday. Do some reading on what Juneteenth is all about. Visit a museum. Attend a local event. Commit to getting involved in your community for racial justice. I understand the responsibility that I and others have as white Americans to ask what we are doing to dismantle a system that has too often undervalued Black life. We cannot just be allies. We have to fight for everyone who’s still waiting for justice. That’s what I’m remembering today as we honor Juneteenth. Elizabeth

name: Letitia James
subject: We’re still marching today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46695432/351391231/265476937?refcode=jtk558-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RlZGI2OC1kMGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rFPtnUgu4ev0yxvEgDnWEq0ymuVXzCRlDsuTw6gDr0=)
---
Peter, today I’m thinking about how far we’ve come in our fight for freedom, and how far we still have to go.

When I was a child, I saw the Civil Rights Movement spill into the streets of New York. I saw my family members and neighbors join together and demand an end to racial discrimination, voter suppression laws, low-paying jobs, and unsafe and unaffordable housing.

And today, we’re still marching to fight many of these injustices.
Even though we’ve made significant progress in our fight for freedom, Black people are _still_ not free. **And, as long as the GOP continues to introduce bills that chip away at our rights to vote, plan our families, live a life free of gun violence, make a livable wage, access affordable housing, and more, we may _never_ be free.**
That’s why I’m still in this fight with you, Peter. When I made history in 2018 as the first Black woman to ever win a statewide election in New York, I knew my success would mean nothing if I couldn’t use my post to fight for the vulnerable. That’s why I vowed to do _everything_ in my power to protect the voiceless and vulnerable – both in New York and beyond.
I’ve spent the last three and a half years as your attorney general fighting to stop the nationwide assault on our most fundamental rights, but the road to equality is long and winding. That’s why this Juneteenth, I vow to celebrate ALL our wins – big and small. I promise to stay in this fight for as long as it takes to obtain true freedom and equality.

Thank you for reading.

Letitia
| | Peter, I’m up for re-election this November, and I need your help to defeat my Republican opponent and continue this fight. body:

Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and still is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma and the NRA, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing a huge fundraising deadline on Tuesday, and right now we’re still very short of our $75,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46696051/351394067/-42398318?refcode=em20220619am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzQzNDZjZS1kMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LHduqJf9BdF_mw0B7eOJ2z9qqU7dNRTCcMVcVuyJg0=)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: From my desk: a Juneteenth message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We still have work to do. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46700328/351412927/823540626?refcode=ea.30ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.30ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGZmOGQxOS1kOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cyWZRXXBLfiAGC3ncGaAw4w4KnuPlqvT7NeDer-3wM=&emci=15972a3c-aded-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=30ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Hello, Peter, and Happy Juneteenth. **Today marks the day in 1865 when the news of freedom finally reached the last enslaved Black men and women in our country in Galveston, Texas.** Today, we honor and recognize the work of Black leaders and activists who led the fight for freedom and those who carry on the fight for equality today. As we celebrate Black heritage, liberation, and freedom, we must also recognize our country’s history. Though never again in this country will one person own another, it’s on all of us to help root out systemic racism that unfortunately still persists. **We have come a long way since 1865, but there’s more work to do. I’m committed to making sure everyone has the opportunities they need to succeed and thrive.** Let’s continue to work together to build a more just and equitable North Carolina that works for everyone. Thank you, Roy
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46700329/351412928/2039383177?refcode=ea.30ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.30ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGZmOGQxOS1kOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cyWZRXXBLfiAGC3ncGaAw4w4KnuPlqvT7NeDer-3wM=&emci=15972a3c-aded-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=30ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602

name: John King
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Like many Black Americans, as a descendant of enslaved people, this day has special significance to me and my family.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46700477/351413308/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220619-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220619-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220619&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=27ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2ZmOGQxOS1kOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ICRX2y9-mNOS1wagGcqJzmUQZddiSPBPCqOxrdUXRQ8=)
---
Peter,

Today is Juneteenth — a holiday that marks the day when enslaved Black people in Galveston, TX got news they were finally free from the inhumane, cruel institution of slavery. Like many Black Americans, as a descendant of enslaved people, this day has special significance to me and my family. My great-grandfather Charles King and his family were enslaved not 25 miles from my house in Montgomery County. I have had the opportunity to stand in the cabin where my ancestors were enslaved with my wife and two daughters — an experience I will never forget.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46700478/351413309/-394402297?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2ZmOGQxOS1kOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ICRX2y9-mNOS1wagGcqJzmUQZddiSPBPCqOxrdUXRQ8=&emci=55047485-f2ec-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=27ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46700479/351413310/-394402297?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2ZmOGQxOS1kOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ICRX2y9-mNOS1wagGcqJzmUQZddiSPBPCqOxrdUXRQ8=&emci=55047485-f2ec-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=27ff8d19-d8ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
It is because my ancestors survived that I am here today. They lived with faith in a future that they could not see. In three generations, my family went from enslaved in that cabin to serving in the Cabinet of the nation’s first Black president. On this Juneteenth, we must also remember that our work is not yet done. Though we now have a federal holiday to commemorate this historic day, **there are still states actively working to ban teaching about our full history** — an egregious attempt to erase our ancestors’ stories. In Virginia, far-right Glenn Youngkin won his gubernatorial election last year by spreading lies and attacking educators who were trying to teach our country’s history. As governor, he is forcing a sanitized version of our past, banning kids from learning the truth about the history of families like mine — and the far-right is trying to do the same thing nationwide.
Peter, we cannot afford to allow people like Glenn Youngkin to succeed. clean_body: Like many Black Americans, as a descendant of enslaved people, this day has special significance to me and my family. | = Peter, Today is Juneteenth — a holiday that marks the day when enslaved Black people in Galveston, TX got news they were finally free from the inhumane, cruel institution of slavery. Like many Black Americans, as a descendant of enslaved people, this day has special significance to me and my family. My great-grandfather Charles King and his family were enslaved not 25 miles from my house in Montgomery County. I have had the opportunity to stand in the cabin where my ancestors were enslaved with my wife and two daughters — an experience I will never forget. It is because my ancestors survived that I am here today. They lived with faith in a future that they could not see. In three generations, my family went from enslaved in that cabin to serving in the Cabinet of the nation’s first Black president. On this Juneteenth, we must also remember that our work is not yet done. Though we now have a federal holiday to commemorate this historic day, there are still states actively working to ban teaching about our full history — an egregious attempt to erase our ancestors’ stories. In Virginia, far-right Glenn Youngkin won his gubernatorial election last year by spreading lies and attacking educators who were trying to teach our country’s history. As governor, he is forcing a sanitized version of our past, banning kids from learning the truth about the history of families like mine — and the far-right is trying to do the same thing nationwide. Peter, we cannot afford to allow people like Glenn Youngkin to succeed. Our students deserve to know the truth to make a better tomorrow. We must all remain committed to dismantling systemic racism & advancing justice. To read more about my campaign’s plan to do just that, please visit us at I still believe that in Maryland and nationwide, we can achieve a more equitable future. I wish you all a very reflective Juneteenth, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: The long road to liberation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
We’re here to fight alongside you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46700618/351413587/1141538894?refcode=EM_C_220619Juneteenth_H_TNDP_90DO_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmZmOGQxOS1kOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q6zBdkGx6Q7JMhRjvP5ZlciETDosL_c_y1Yk0npeePI=) Happy Juneteenth! Today, Americans will celebrate the newest federal holiday – Juneteenth. Though it was only signed into law in 2021 by President Joe Biden, Juneteenth has been celebrated by the Black community for generations.

This day commemorates when the last group of enslaved Black people in Texas learned that they were freed – two and a half years after President Lincoln signed the Emancipation Proclamation. **This reminds us that our fight is not done until all of us are free.**

Now, communities gather in jubilation, remembrance, and reflection. It also highlights a great opportunity for race and equality dialogues among all communities. Here in Tennessee, we have seen election rules changed specifically to exclude Black voters. Just a few months ago, the state refused to recognize Juneteenth as an official state holiday.

We know we have a lot of work to do to fight systemic racism. Today and every day, we stand with Black Tennesseans. We will do everything in our power to protect the rights of everyone. Thank you for being with us in this fight.

Forward,

Tennessee Democratic Party | The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who believe that all Tennesseans deserve a better future no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray. We’re committed to registering 200,000 new voters ahead of the 2022 elections. Given what’s at stake, we can’t afford to miss our chance.

**Can you help Take Back Tennessee by giving monthly?**

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: celebrating Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
I wanted to take a moment to email you because this is not just a regular Sunday; it’s Juneteenth!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46702075/351418637/2085084876?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220619-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGIwYjQ5Zi1kOWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNC8iUURRYa71d9XbFPqe4c2UyTeWSnSfLLDzf9NBDs=)
---
| Hey Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to email you because this is not just a regular Sunday; it’s Juneteenth!

Juneteenth is celebrated on June 19th to commemorate the emancipation of enslaved people in the US. Specifically, it recognizes the day in 1865 in which Black, enslaved people in Galveston, Texas, were informed of their freedom. **More than two years after the Emancipation Proclamation.**

It is a day of resistance, freedom, and joy. It also reminds us of where we have been and how far we have left to go. I got my start in public service after witnessing the inequities facing Black and Brown children in our school system. I fought to change that on the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City School Board and pledge to continue that fight in Congress.

If there’s one thing working in public service over the years has taught me, it’s that progress is not linear. But, when we come together and work hard: **We can accomplish big things.** I am proud to be running on a bold agenda to champion voting rights, transform our criminal justice system, improve access to healthcare, and pass the Green New Deal. All these issues are intersectional, and we must fight for all of them to create a better world in the future.

I hope you can take some time today to reflect on this important history.

In solidarity,
---

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: thinking about my dad today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I wanted to take a moment to honor fathers, husbands, parental figures and loved ones everywhere
| | |
---
Friend, my father wasn’t a wealthy man.
He was a janitor. I remember when my father worked seven days a week to keep the lights on in our small two-room house in Jacksonville. Having seven children to feed must’ve felt like an overwhelming task, but somehow he and my mother, a maid, made it work every time.
When I was in seventh grade, my class was going on a big trip to Washington, D.C. I was nervous to even ask my parents to go on the trip. Surely there were better things our money could go toward than sending me up the East Coast, but my parents, who did everything they could to make sure I reached my full potential, didn’t even bat an eye.
**My father asked for an advance on his paycheck to cover the cost of my plane ticket and, just a few weeks later, I visited D.C. for what would be the first of many, many more trips.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46701294/351415587/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3427-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZmOGQxOS1kOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WAi3y4psMifKsUtRgR3ZqCrB-E0nIj8RGoxe6u10Nvg=)
Friend, to this day I’m still amazed that my father was willing to sacrifice so much to send me on a seemingly inconsequential trip. I wonder what he would think if he saw me now, going into the U.S. Capitol with a cup of coffee and an unyielding determination to fight for good. **I wonder if he knew that he might have changed the entire trajectory of my life by sending me on that trip.**
But this is just one story of sacrifice from a father – and I’m sure that each of you reading this has a similar story to share about a loved one. That’s why this Father’s Day, I wanted to take a moment to honor fathers, husbands, parental figures and loved ones everywhere and say thank you for all your hard work.
So from my family to yours, I hope you all have a very happy Father’s Day and feel extra loved today.
Thank you for sharing this day with me,

Val Demings

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to honor fathers, husbands, parental figures and loved ones everywhere | | | Friend, my father wasn’t a wealthy man. He was a janitor. I remember when my father worked seven days a week to keep the lights on in our small two-room house in Jacksonville. Having seven children to feed must’ve felt like an overwhelming task, but somehow he and my mother, a maid, made it work every time. When I was in seventh grade, my class was going on a big trip to Washington, D.C. I was nervous to even ask my parents to go on the trip. Surely there were better things our money could go toward than sending me up the East Coast, but my parents, who did everything they could to make sure I reached my full potential, didn’t even bat an eye. My father asked for an advance on his paycheck to cover the cost of my plane ticket and, just a few weeks later, I visited D.C. for what would be the first of many, many more trips. = Friend, to this day I’m still amazed that my father was willing to sacrifice so much to send me on a seemingly inconsequential trip. I wonder what he would think if he saw me now, going into the U.S. Capitol with a cup of coffee and an unyielding determination to fight for good. I wonder if he knew that he might have changed the entire trajectory of my life by sending me on that trip. But this is just one story of sacrifice from a father – and I’m sure that each of you reading this has a similar story to share about a loved one. That’s why this Father’s Day, I wanted to take a moment to honor fathers, husbands, parental figures and loved ones everywhere and say thank you for all your hard work. So from my family to yours, I hope you all have a very happy Father’s Day and feel extra loved today. Thank you for sharing this day with me, Val Demings | | = | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. body:
I wanted to share an update on my race
| | |
---
I wanted to share an update on my race, Grace, and I hope you'll read this through to the end.
A Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll showed that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – nearly every single way you can imagine. But I'm a few points behind Marco Rubio and the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points.
Does it worry me? Absolutely. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate.
I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so, so much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's fundraising goals.
Every single dollar will make a difference in this must-win race, so I'm asking: Please, split $3 or whatever you can spare right now between me and Maggie Hassan to defend our Democratic Senate majority.

name: Ashley
subject: Wishing you a Happy Juneteenth!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46702849/351421705/800846522?refcode=fl_email_na_20220619juneteenth_AE_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGViMDQ3MC1kYmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jh9pFdGdqgW21fji6pBjQM_BWxEg4Ni9hCgtas1WHWU=)
---
Happy Juneteenth, team! **Today marks the day that news of the Emancipation Proclamation finally reached Texas and the last enslaved African Americans in 1865.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46702850/351421708/800846522?refcode=fl_email_na_20220619juneteenth_AE_full_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGViMDQ3MC1kYmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jh9pFdGdqgW21fji6pBjQM_BWxEg4Ni9hCgtas1WHWU=)
---
Since that day more than 150 years ago, Black communities have celebrated Juneteenth or Freedom Day every year, but it wasn’t until 2021 that Juneteenth was made a federal holiday in the aftermath of the nationwide protests and calls for racial justice following the murders of George Floyd and Breonna Taylor in 2020.
Today, we celebrate freedom and emancipation while continuing to put in the work for true racial justice, including fighting for criminal justice reform, creating equity in healthcare, housing, education, and employment, and stopping the increase in anti-Black hate crimes.
In Congress, I will stand up for each and every member of our communities here in Bucks and Montgomery Counties. But I won’t wait until I am in Congress to take action, and I hope you join me in doing the same. Here are three things you can do to stand up for justice and equity for all:
* Support Black-owned businesses
* Attend the Juneteenth Celebrations in your community

clean_body: | = Happy Juneteenth, team! Today marks the day that news of the Emancipation Proclamation finally reached Texas and the last enslaved African Americans in 1865. | = Since that day more than 150 years ago, Black communities have celebrated Juneteenth or Freedom Day every year, but it wasn’t until 2021 that Juneteenth was made a federal holiday in the aftermath of the nationwide protests and calls for racial justice following the murders of George Floyd and Breonna Taylor in 2020. Today, we celebrate freedom and emancipation while continuing to put in the work for true racial justice, including fighting for criminal justice reform, creating equity in healthcare, housing, education, and employment, and stopping the increase in anti-Black hate crimes. In Congress, I will stand up for each and every member of our communities here in Bucks and Montgomery Counties. But I won’t wait until I am in Congress to take action, and I hope you join me in doing the same. Here are three things you can do to stand up for justice and equity for all: Support Black-owned businesses Attend the Juneteenth Celebrations in your community Join Bucks County NAACP chapter I hope you enjoy this holiday as we reflect on this important day in American history, — Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = ** | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Donna F. Edwards
subject: It's time to cancel student debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Congress Donna Edwards for Congress
body:
Student debt is crushing millions of people across the country — leaving so many unable to pursue their dreams and build financial stability. This crisis harms our communities, our economy and our country’s future. We must end it.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46702881/351421931/-2061771328?source=ldr_welcome_em4_web&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY4ODg4NS1kYmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYTupOm7CtRHA7KOKF1HxCaGsvwdiypK2ip0TRbFWRI=&emci=9fd787de-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=26688885-dbef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14034724)

| | Peter, February 12, 2008 was a huge day for me. It was the day I won the Democratic primary to become the first Black woman to represent Maryland in Congress. That morning, before I voted, delivered a similarly huge personal victory for me. At 49 years old, after over 25 years, I mailed my last check. I was finally student-debt free.**Sound outrageous? That’s because it is.** America’s student debt crisis has existed for decades, **and it’s only getting worse.** $43,000 is the AVERAGE student loan debt of a Maryland resident — well above the national norm. And this crisis disproportionately hurts people of color and women. A reality I know all too well. An education should propel you forward in life, not hold you back. Yet, millions are struggling to make ends meet just for pursuing their dreams. **That’s not right. ** That’s why I’m running for Congress — to push for real change for the people of Maryland. If elected, I would make canceling student debt a top priority. Because no American should be financially worse off for pursuing a quality education in this country. **[If you agree, add your name and demand we cancel student debt NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46702883/351421932/-2061771328?source=ldr_welcome_em4_web&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY4ODg4NS1kYmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYTupOm7CtRHA7KOKF1HxCaGsvwdiypK2ip0TRbFWRI=&emci=9fd787de-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=26688885-dbef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14034724) ****
**

Student debt is crushing millions of people across the country — leaving so many unable to pursue their dreams and build financial stability. **This crisis harms our communities, our economy and our country’s future. We must end it.** No person should be saddled with over two decades of debt, like I was, just from following their dreams. That’s why I need your help to fix this crisis. **[Join my call to CANCEL STUDENT DEBT TODAY and let’s deliver a victory for the millions of Americans who desperately need it!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46702886/351421935/-2061771328?source=ldr_welcome_em4_web&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY4ODg4NS1kYmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYTupOm7CtRHA7KOKF1HxCaGsvwdiypK2ip0TRbFWRI=&emci=9fd787de-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=26688885-dbef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14034724) ** Thank you, Donna

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Honoring the fight for racial justice this Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Hi Derek,

I wanted to reach out today to commemorate Juneteenth. On this day in 1865, the last enslaved people in the Confederacy were freed – two years after President Lincoln signed the Emancipation Proclamation and months before ratification of the Thirteenth Amendment barring slavery in the United States once and for all.

This day is so important because it reminds us of the journey we’ve taken as a nation to live up to our values of freedom, liberty, and prosperity for all. Emancipation itself did not lead to full citizenship: it took a century for full voting rights for Black Americans to become a reality. Although we have come a long way, we still have a ways to go, with far too many left behind.

And that fight is at the heart of my campaign’s commitment to our common good. I promise that when I’m in Congress, I will be a fierce advocate for all Americans.

This weekend, I’m honored to attend Juneteenth celebrations in Beaver Falls, McKees Rocks, and Sewickley.

Thank you for your time,

Chris Deluzio

----------
Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.

[https://www.facebook.com/ChrisforPA]
[https://twitter.com/ChrisForPA]
[https://chrisforpa.com]

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States
Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy, or Department of the Army.

This day is so important because it reminds us of the journey we’ve taken as a nation to live up to our values of freedom, liberty, and prosperity for all. Emancipation itself did not lead to full citizenship: it took a century for full voting rights for Black Americans to become a reality. Although we have come a long way, we still have a ways to go, with far too many left behind. And that fight is at the heart of my campaign’s commitment to our common good. I promise that when I’m in Congress, I will be a fierce advocate for all Americans. This weekend, I’m honored to attend Juneteenth celebrations in Beaver Falls, McKees Rocks, and Sewickley. Thank you for your time, Chris Deluzio Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine. [] [] [] Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy, or Department of the Army. name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Celebrating freedom and strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com]Hey Peter,
I want to take some time today to talk about Juneteenth and why we celebrate it.
On today’s date in 1865, Union soldiers issued General Order No. 3, which informed Texans that all enslaved persons were free. Today we not only celebrate the freeing of Black slaves on this day, but we also celebrate and recognize the resilience and the solidarity within the Black community.
This day has been celebrated every year since then and is one of the longest-running celebrated holidays in our country’s history. In North Carolina, we’ve officially recognized this holiday since 2007, and now that it has become a federal holiday, we recognize the 19th day of June each year as Juneteenth National Freedom Day.
Take time and celebrate today as it is. A celebration of liberation and a celebration of solidarity and perseverance.
Have a great Juneteenth celebration,
Wiley
http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com [http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com]
