name: Jared E. Moskowitz
subject: Father’s Day Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,
Today is the first Father’s Day I’ll spend without my father, Mike Moskowitz, who passed away in January.
I’m also not the only one who doesn’t have their father on Father’s Day. Today is a special opportunity to cherish their memories.
Even though my father isn’t with us this year, I’m filled with gratitude. My dad introduced me to public service and politics at a very young age.
My first ever political experience was going to see Jesse Jackson at a Democratic convention with my dad when I was 8 years old. I’ll never forget when Senator Bill Nelson came over to our house and gave me a model space shuttle, or when I had the chance to meet President Clinton in middle school.
As I celebrate Father’s Day while running for Congress, I’m so grateful to my father for all he did for me and all he taught me. But I wish he was here to do this with me.
My dad taught me to fight for what’s right and stand up for our Democratic values. While today is challenging, it’s also a reminder to pass those values on to my own sons.
I’m looking forward to celebrating with them, telling them a little more about their grandfather, and spending some time together as a family.
https://jaredforflorida.com/ [https://jaredforflorida.com/]
As we enter the final two months of this campaign, Father’s Day provides me with a reminder of why I’m doing this. My father inspired me to pursue a career of service, and I’m more excited than ever about what comes next.
Most importantly, I want to fight for Florida families in Washington. And I want to build a future that will make my sons–and all of our children–proud.
I hope you have a wonderful Father’s Day.
Warmly,
Jared Moskowitz
Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4229%2E3611125%2E1BEMbc ][IMG]

Hello,

157 years ago, Union troops marched to Galveston, Texas to deliver the
news that Black Southerners were free from enslavement more than two years
after the Emancipation Proclamation was signed. Now we remember this day,
known as Juneteenth, in honor of Black liberation and the end of slavery.

But today, I want us to also recognize that we still have a long way to go
before all Black Americans are truly free.

The end of slavery was not the end of racial injustice. Structural and
systemic racism is real—and it’s still there. Our commitment to right
these wrongs must never waver.

We can’t let progress distract us from today’s fight against voter
suppression, mass incarceration and the racial wealth gap—all of which
disproportionately harm Black Americans.

That’s why I’m committed to continuing the fight for justice in health
care, housing and education, making sure Black Americans can get
good-paying jobs, and working to finally restore the Voting Rights Act.

Making Juneteenth a federal holiday was long overdue. And I’m proud to
have supported that legislation to recognize our history. But as we
celebrate the 157th anniversary of emancipation, let us continue the fight
for progress in order to usher in true justice and equality for all.

In solidarity,

Tim Ryan

subject: Sorry to bother you, but I need you 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
Sorry to bother you, but I need you

Hey, Patriot.

I hate to reach out like this on a weekend, so I'll keep this short.

Ever since my historic win as the first Republican elected in TX-34 and the first Mexican-American Congresswoman EVER, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden have unleashed their army onto me.

They'll do anything to discredit me and my victory because _I am pro-Trump, a legal Mexican immigrant, a border patrol wife, and a proud Christian. _
**********[**RUSH A DONATION NOW >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619200:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)********** Let's face it: the Republican party represents the things that my fellow Hispanic Americans and I hold closely: faith, family, and freedom. **It angers the Democrats to no end.**

I am humbly asking for your support in order to stand a chance against the far left's fundraising machine. [**Every single day is CRITICAL in this fight.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619200:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619200:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619200:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619200:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619200:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)**[**If we have any chance of a Red Wave and taking back the House, I need your help to reach my daily fundraising goals.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619200:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)**

Thank you for your consideration and support, Patriot. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619200:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r) Mayra
Sent from iPhone

_[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619201:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)__

Important Message for This Nation's TOP PATRIOTS: _ We'll be honest with you the future of America is ON THE LINE. The Democrats are running this country into the ground with their socialist agenda, and WE'RE RUNNING OUT OF TIME to stop them. The ONLY CHANCE we have to end their DESTRUCTION is to take back the House and pass America First conservative policies. If we fail to win, we can say goodbye to the America we know and love, [**so please chip in any amount you can to help us defeat the Democrats in the MOST IMPORTANT MIDTERMS IN AMERICAN HISTORY.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619201:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r) We can't do this WITHOUT YOU! **********[**EMERGENCY DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619201:JCIsGqoNI:m:1:3299561967:73AD2DD1F75CE20E7B91D478BA83BBFD:r)**********

name: David and Ian
subject: Celebrating Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
We as a country cannot continue allowing corrupt and racist officials to occupy seats in our government. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46697598/351400604/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0YjA0OGU4LWQzZWYtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=drYSG53ksHBn2TDBq7Yo8bJI-Jk2tSYioxtANJjI_EA=&emci=46175b8a-a0ed-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f4b048e8-d3ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Happy Juneteenth, team!

Even though the Emancipation Proclamation was adopted to our constitution on December 18, 1865, it took nearly a year and a half for the final enslaved Americans to be freed. Why did this happen? Because white enslavers evaded the law and were aided by corrupt officials who facilitated this act of treason and brutality.

The United States was built on the backs of enslaved Black Americans, and it's been a long journey in the fight for equality; one that is by no means complete. Milestones like the right to vote and the right even exist in society have been achieved through the work of fearless activists and brave individuals that sought to flip the dynamics of our society at great personal cost. **Today, we honor them, celebrate them, and mourn the fact that they even had to.**

We are proud to support and elevate Black voices, and we are committed to doing our part in the fight for equal rights. For decades, the members of the Republican party have been at the forefront of attacking and eroding the rights of Black Americans. The Trump administration only emboldened this movement, and we know that the members of the Treason Caucus represent an active threat to all of our rights, especially the rights of people of color. **We as a country cannot continue allowing corrupt and racist officials to occupy seats in our government.**

**Today, we are here to say that we remain committed to unseating the members of the Treason Caucus and helping the crusade for equal rights in any way that we can.**

Thank you,

David and Ian
Co-Founders
Never Again PAC

| PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
---
Never Again PAC
PO Box 2153
Purcellville, VA 20134
United States
---
If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://action.neveragainpac.com/p/URGJswsiqkemaLro4bZFCg2?unsubscribedata=H3qrGgXqr5RG9ndjZtCNgGVLgPhMlc7agjy0Xex5cn2%2BltGWo%2FJuR9%2BKi0yvUjIYi0amTvU%2FkqN5%2Fx%2BY7aqIkZycf1OewgA8BHzZDG%2Fvr2E7z%2BBHv4p1b%2Bbvhj566qtldswJlc4amLHJlz6y8pSS%2F7IrCGB617wyEtsX%2Ft%2BPCT4gLuOsGn%2BLJmrFcn3r%2FOdeU9Sc8D3MQiELMRN8H6g1C7yCSCcKDEVpHl14FAISoiRLKYgVpWBrfLuycfeiz8WxcVldkj6mjCqzS%2F9S2q4RY11e1j%2FdGzEZhrP99aFQUtHnix1D9GJDDs%2Fa4I66frTxwZcR%2BhFEzEIy%2F3978nD20jTqsEhCsXFS2GqjWIcWNiTHikeEEqyZBRpJpKhizk%2FK5M7cCPU1ikR1bySmINK34fQMbvqPcDg16tvua6gEwjs%3D).
---

subject: Recommitting to the fight for racial justice and equity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrfKrHWNyblUEJakoMBzmE7mgnfShizOy5ilVGHxdyFeJJJEEvumZ9426PBKgVa2xPcC26JiQOdsUUPTfpRIE9JUfyBKtb-SZMNUEfEPCrzCfDMV0SZnz6RB676g2EhVyagxIZ5M2egdLIDFpUby3NS7eXEF15lSPOjMcA39KYa2rAcRoMQrO65aVTu3RkU_8TYG9jdMfmmbwPUWfJU9KGz3kgUiotuUJBQ2N9EfkhhdZXB14C6t_zZo_vNBp5SvF3WTLHLX8EJm8FlPGLk0TAMmiqDC_PTRrSVInOq_05qKLsg-X4KFSyHH9ACA_zfklhE9YD-O6PcrSPpMh5xDVuWdmtDE7WOAwhb-hjPmTNYBFb4HviQtVFV5T-JDO8voPE/3n1/3szamS-XSx6o1Zhiu94IlA/h0/rS-fiRtyNSJTs_1596GJJ1wu0h1tso_gs9rmcrT8ba4)
---
Peter Willis, this Sunday is Juneteenth, which marks the day that two years after being signed, news of the Emancipation Proclamation was finally delivered to Galveston, Texas, freeing the last of those enslaved in the United States.
On Juneteenth, communities around the U.S. gather to commemorate this freedom and celebrate Black culture with music, food, art, and dance.
**But while we celebrate freedom this Sunday, we must also recommit to the fight for racial justice and equity.**
Injustice and disparities against our Black community continue on a daily basis, from being disadvantaged in housing and employment, subjected to police violence, or dealing with threats from the growing white nationalist movement. In 2020, there was a 43% increase in anti-Black hate crimes across the United States. The right-wing is on a campaign to erase Black history, and any attempts to account for our racist past and current systemic racism.
I will stand up for the rights of my Black friends and neighbors, and I am committed to our collective liberation so every family in NY-03 can thrive. **That’s why I'm running for Congress — because our communities deserve a champion with the courage to fight for what’s right.**
Thanks for joining me in this fight, Peter Willis. Hoping we all have a chance to get outside and safely enjoy this beautiful holiday weekend with our friends, families, and loved ones!
— Melanie

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. clean_body: | | | | Peter Willis, this Sunday is Juneteenth, which marks the day that two years after being signed, news of the Emancipation Proclamation was finally delivered to Galveston, Texas, freeing the last of those enslaved in the United States. On Juneteenth, communities around the U.S. gather to commemorate this freedom and celebrate Black culture with music, food, art, and dance. But while we celebrate freedom this Sunday, we must also recommit to the fight for racial justice and equity. Injustice and disparities against our Black community continue on a daily basis, from being disadvantaged in housing and employment, subjected to police violence, or dealing with threats from the growing white nationalist movement. In 2020, there was a 43% increase in anti-Black hate crimes across the United States. The right-wing is on a campaign to erase Black history, and any attempts to account for our racist past and current systemic racism. I will stand up for the rights of my Black friends and neighbors, and I am committed to our collective liberation so every family in NY-03 can thrive. That’s why I'm running for Congress — because our communities deserve a champion with the courage to fight for what’s right. Thanks for joining me in this fight, Peter Willis. Hoping we all have a chance to get outside and safely enjoy this beautiful holiday weekend with our friends, families, and loved ones! — Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo for NY-03, please .

name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, Happy Juneteenth! Today is a day to commemorate the end of slavery in the United States. It is a day of celebration, a day of community, and a day of commitment to keep fighting for true freedom. We can’t stop now. This is a moment for us to recommit to fighting for the substantive policies of racial justice. Racial justice means tackling the structural inequities that persist in our society today. In housing, healthcare, employment, and the criminal justice system. It means environmental justice. It means dismantling the school-to-prison pipeline and ending the War on Drugs. Both have needlessly upended the lives of so many Black people in this country. Racial justice means reparations for the descendants of enslaved African peoples, starting with H.R. 40. It means protecting voter rights and ending deep inequities in education. It means removing the loophole in the 13th Amendment which allows for prisoners to be paid mere pennies for their labor – because the law ending slavery should never come with an asterisk. We will fight for these desperately needed policies which will change people’s lives. We will fight for justice – While we celebrate Juneteenth. In solidarity and with love, Mckayla | [Donate
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-xfRne8nBgqmw4DAPVC_ZZBFF50mstHARcKGXvUvOUbiJ2ML1tv66o29YRxGVSchpF3POzJmCFHkKBGwES-2eoQxOM-UExT8eutIXRUUxNwnFLODYCdkj_SThZn3w9Tmm7vAxg0mVV_62_helux8DiU6QoBrvc_OQZv58TDTTk5sc9ndmtM1hFzijxHPhvuEKywGei4G-kPHRr071gCzcyRh1VmaittqM9LsnFgvs1YJb6T277G4Vr7dd3JSGs44cVWTM34hv3_UGOdh2hoWx/3n1/EQOt7BGeSYyMyvP_Q499qg/h0/cqO7mzcE6ExeNRvCEmN_qR12j9b8lXJuBEb1zA0QeS0)

Here’s the deal, friend – the Roberts Supreme Court doesn’t seem to care if redistricting is fair. | **Salon:
“Supreme Court lets states use illegally gerrymandered GOP maps in 2022 midterm elections” **
---
[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46715440/351461075/792749532?amount=20&refcode=20220619.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjN2M1MGEyLWY5ZWYtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=btLLMIBF1vCOkGnu1Yw7Vw4zgLuB5Np2XeBC1ysVs58=)
So it’s clear our movement can’t rely on SCOTUS. Instead, **we have to be proactive** about _building on the progress_ we’ve made toward fair redistricting and _securing a future_ in which fair elections are protected.

**How do we do that?** By using the 2022 elections to:
➞ Support Democrats who will fight for fair maps
➞ Hold Republican map manipulators like Ron DeSantis accountable
➞ Prevent the GOP from stacking state courts
➞ Defend our democracy
**_[Help us do it>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46715441/351461102/792749532?amount=20&refcode=20220619.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjN2M1MGEyLWY5ZWYtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=btLLMIBF1vCOkGnu1Yw7Vw4zgLuB5Np2XeBC1ysVs58=)_**

clean_body: the Roberts Supreme Court doesn’t seem to care if redistricting is fair. | Here’s the deal, friend – the Roberts Supreme Court doesn’t seem to care if redistricting is fair. | Salon: “Supreme Court lets states use illegally gerrymandered GOP maps in 2022 midterm elections” = So it’s clear our movement can’t rely on SCOTUS. Instead, we have to be proactive about building on the progress we’ve made toward fair redistricting and securing a future in which fair elections are protected. How do we do that? By using the 2022 elections to: ➞ Support Democrats who will fight for fair maps ➞ Hold Republican map manipulators like Ron DeSantis accountable ➞ Prevent the GOP from stacking state courts ➞ Defend our democracy = The NDRC just announced our initial list of 2022 Democracy Targets, dozens of races for offices that will play a critical role in determining whether redistricting is fair and whether our democracy is strong – or compromised. Friend, as someone who cares about fair maps and voting rights, you've seen what Republicans are willing to do in service of cementing their own power. This election could be our last chance to stop them. Will you chip in to support our 2022 work? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. body:
With so much at stake, we can't afford to lose this seat to a far-right Republican.
| | |
---
Friend –
Growing up, I spent a lot of time outdoors.
My mother's cardinal rule with my siblings and me was that children should be outside as much as possible. And boy, did we stay busy ...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46715838/351462878/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1169-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FiOGY1NC1mYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=de1klyiiAqCvRHVIjobDtqiciqaVwP5y58VcB7yL3Gs=)
Every summer, we would visit our grandparents at the beach, swimming in all types of weather. And every winter we would skate on the pond by our house.
My grandpa taught me how to fish, and I learned to take care of and ride horses at summer camp in Londonderry.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46715839/351462879/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1169-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FiOGY1NC1mYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=de1klyiiAqCvRHVIjobDtqiciqaVwP5y58VcB7yL3Gs=)
Sometimes when my mom wanted us out of the house, my dad would take my siblings and me hiking in the woods, giving us marching orders as if he were drilling soldiers in the army.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46715844/351462881/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1169-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FiOGY1NC1mYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=de1klyiiAqCvRHVIjobDtqiciqaVwP5y58VcB7yL3Gs=)
From learning to work out my differences with others on the pond ice to answering my dad's prodding questions about what I'm doing for democracy, I look back on my childhood fondly – it was these lessons that led me to a career in public service.
I now have the privilege of serving New Hampshire in the United States Senate, where I’m committed to putting party differences aside to deliver on the issues that matter most to Granite Staters.
I’m fighting to protect safe and legal reproductive health care. And I’m working tooth and nail to lower costs for Granite State families.
But I can't do it alone. My last race was the closest in the country, so I'm one of Mitch McConnell's top targets this election cycle. Extreme GOP groups are spending millions of dollars to flip this seat, and a public poll shows me down by two points.
With so much at stake, we can't afford to lose this seat to a far-right Republican.
**[That's why I'm reaching out to ask: Please donate $3 or whatever you can to my campaign so that Democrats can hold control of the Senate and so that I can continue fighting for families like yours. In a race this competitive, any amount is greatly appreciated.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46715851/351462889/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1169-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FiOGY1NC1mYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=de1klyiiAqCvRHVIjobDtqiciqaVwP5y58VcB7yL3Gs=)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Doug Mastriano for Governor
subject: Happy Father's Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO
body:
| | [ ](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdkDFvwyAQhX8N3mzhMwE8eEgapUPVoUOrZrIwEJsIbBLjVumvL3bdqKqEkHjf3fHeqYoLXGKemAowAKZ5mZMckyITXG7khpMSpGBlQxHB2gljMzVMLWmHj0wOLumqDW20xKdGNEQCE4RxyaTMNcWyIZzrxFZdCH5ExRbBIZ6__bNSHKbgaqeVmRwq9ssnCOgsjsN0lTqKvbS1cN6a021FMj6FafsIf42nnfD-Vp9E6PR1rJW41w590H34mZM-Xmihn_2Z84jr3hoVwT-xMyoa3jt2kee35Fop_2msNSNlcQ3tsoY5_WqpQmyHAJYmgCUoHJ96cexe26-XdDfo9L3NZwQP8Q43r-9164hsjQ2I7b8BeEB-yA)
---
Happy Father’s Day
Rebbie and I would like to take a moment to recognize the men today on this Father’s Day. Just as mothers are important in the upbringing of children, fathers have an equally important role. Those fathers, father figures, and positive male role models, in our lives and communities, deserve our appreciation and recognition, for the positive impact that they have on their children and on society.
Today, we want to take a moment to thank the men/fathers who:
* are fathers that work hard to create a strong, positive foundation for their children.
* are surrogate or adoptive fathers who have selflessly chosen to take on the father role.
* have lost a child and/or experienced a difficult journey yet remain dedicated to being there for all who depend on them.
* have overcome their own difficult or non-existent relationships with their own fathers to become a positive influence on those who come in contact with them.
* are new Dads just starting out on the most important role they’ll ever have.
* have passed away but left behind a legacy of wisdom and important lessons for their loved ones.
* serve their community and country and are often away from their families and/or have jobs that put them in harm's way.
* volunteer and serve in the community to be that positive role model for those who need it.

Finally, a special remembrance of the father of Pennsylvania, William Penn, who wanted a place to live without persecution. Likewise, we remember the founding fathers of this nation, who sacrificed and worked to protect our liberties and freedoms, by drafting the United States Constitution that remains the law of the land today.
| | |
---
|
---
| | So, for all the fathers/father figures/role models of the past, present, and future, Rebbie and I extend our love and encouragement. And we especially want to thank our heavenly Father for all His love, guidance, and strength, as well as allowing me to serve in the greatest, most rewarding role of my life - Father.
Happy Father’s Day.
---

clean_body: | | Happy Father’s Day Rebbie and I would like to take a moment to recognize the men today on this Father’s Day. Just as mothers are important in the upbringing of children, fathers have an equally important role. Those fathers, father figures, and positive male role models, in our lives and communities, deserve our appreciation and recognition, for the positive impact that they have on their children and on society. Today, we want to take a moment to thank the men/fathers who: are fathers that work hard to create a strong, positive foundation for their children. are surrogate or adoptive fathers who have selflessly chosen to take on the father role. have lost a child and/or experienced a difficult journey yet remain dedicated to being there for all who depend on them. have overcome their own difficult or non-existent relationships with their own fathers to become a positive influence on those who come in contact with them. are new Dads just starting out on the most important role they’ll ever have. have passed away but left behind a legacy of wisdom and important lessons for their loved ones. serve their community and country and are often away from their families and/or have jobs that put them in harm's way. volunteer and serve in the community to be that positive role model for those who need it. Finally, a special remembrance of the father of Pennsylvania, William Penn, who wanted a place to live without persecution. Likewise, we remember the founding fathers of this nation, who sacrificed and worked to protect our liberties and freedoms, by drafting the United States Constitution that remains the law of the land today. | | | | | | So, for all the fathers/father figures/role models of the past, present, and future, Rebbie and I extend our love and encouragement. And we especially want to thank our heavenly Father for all His love, guidance, and strength, as well as allowing me to serve in the greatest, most rewarding role of my life - Father. Happy Father’s Day. | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO -

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Celebrating Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District. If you no longer wish to receive emails, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sSRynqGvEUuAD1QP3hBpsA2?unsubscribedata=1uhdK4LPd7ZK4gVhPP5kZHVKtiVn3QwYmzmvgpNajGaMhiUbLFnP8%2FCip0Eb1A21phHm2nrf8jTWD1Cfp4g9oTzWO4KDPL%2B0BhkxKF4AG4Fk7arlBaLyFKklZd1Rb%2BK0ol4UnKZ90H12wo%2BLrKZcfYsMib4vy2iexz31yrw%2BWWli13jw63SgMnEIot5w9qbvFmxu7D4eJCosILe2fvGQDu5RzHz9%2BiRNXDB3QAeO0wifivcsCGw9SSBGDywWDs8OFnzZHOiv2PgX4YpWxJnDPVvUjc%2Bb8wcafDX0Bif3c5uE98reuZ5T397QLfVJNF79H9BVDC2D0mCbPY%2Bii2OMUMZLuJrjNN74Cpr%2BJlPfIOu9AUpbIxfwXcg1drIAC77lKVnmGZgVKSH%2FcHPmf0zPjRGSdAcc67hQEnsjhHDYRos%3D .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/esca-15-email-june2022-fr-june?refcode=header&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/esca-15-email-june2022-fr-june?refcode=header&amount=15]
Friend,

Happy Juneteenth! Juneteenth marks the date that the enslaved people of Galveston, TX learned they were free on June 19th, 1865, more than two years after Lincoln’s Emancipation Proclamation.

Today is a celebration of independence, justice, and joy, but it also comes with the recognition that Black Americans continue to face inequality. We can honor the history of progress with celebration and with the commitment to continuing the fight.

I will always continue to push for the justice, peace, and equity that Black Americans deserve . That’s why I voted for Juneteenth to become a national holiday when it was brought to the House floor and why I will always fight for economic progress and fairness for all.

Have a safe and happy Juneteenth.

— Eric

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#

Friends -
On this day in 1865 — more than two full years after the Emancipation Proclamation was signed — word reached the last enslaved people in Galveston, Texas that they were free.
Juneteenth is a day not only to join together and celebrate the liberation of Black Americans, but to reflect on our nation’s history, and recognize the great deal of work that lies ahead in the struggle for freedom, liberty, and justice for all.
Today I am remembering and honoring all of the people who suffered the horrors of slavery, and who fought and died to abolish it.
Who lived through reconstruction, the era of Jim Crow laws, and who organized the civil rights movement.
And who, to this day, are on the frontlines in the fight to end racist voting laws, zoning regulations, housing discrimination, police brutality, criminal justice policies, and so much more.
The truth is that until our country faces its history, confronts it head-on and with clear eyes, and takes tremendous steps forward toward justice, we can never truly progress.
We must continue to advocate, organize, and yes — fight — for policies that advance the cause of freedom and begin to heal the racial, environmental, social, and economic injustices that disproportionately impact Black people to this day, in New York and across the country.
This Juneteenth and every other day, we must re-commit ourselves to that fight.
Thank you for reading,
Alessandra

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=841%2E59515%2EBKOhD9).

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Liz Cheney's kangaroo court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter:

**Liz Cheney won't stop at locking up Donald Trump.**

Liz Cheney is now helping the January 6 witch hunt committee fabricate the grounds to impeach Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas.

Ilhan Omar and other Democrats are already on record demanding Congress impeach Justice Thomas over the events of January 6.

_And now, the committee is seeking to frame Justice Thomas' wife Ginni as an "insurrectionist."_

All because Ginni Thomas questioned the results of the 2020 election.

Going after Ginni Thomas is cowardice, and it's why I'm working with President Trump to FIRE Liz Cheney.

**But President Trump and I can't kick Liz Cheney out of Congress and out of the Republican Party without your help.**

**[So will you chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or $100 so I can mobilize the America First movement to defeat Liz Cheney in her August 16 primary](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60356204:szOKGLhAN:m:1:2365227053:BDA3BA8A31A21E81E1A7846A5944A22B:r)?** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60356204:szOKGLhAN:m:1:2365227053:BDA3BA8A31A21E81E1A7846A5944A22B:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIRE LIZ CHENEY
CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60356204:szOKGLhAN:m:1:2365227053:BDA3BA8A31A21E81E1A7846A5944A22B:r) **The January 6 witch hunt committee is a show trial straight out of Stalinist Russia.**

Due process doesn't exist, and Nancy Pelosi stacked the deck with Never Trumpers like Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and Adam Schiff.

Cheney and co-conspirators already made it clear their goal is to stop Donald Trump from running for re-election in 2024.

But stopping Trump isn't enough for this band of petty tyrants.

**Attacking Justice Thomas as part of a decades-long vendetta by sliming his wife is the last straw.**

Democrats desire to impeach Justice Thomas as part of a bullying campaign to force conservative justices to change their votes on issues like gun control, abortion, and free speech.

A lunatic liberal already tried to assassinate Justice Brett Kavanaugh to bully the justices.

It's time to bring the curtain down on the January 6 kangaroo court.

**And that starts by firing Liz Cheney.**

**[That's why I'm asking you to stand with President Trump and myself in the fight to end the January 6 witch hunt and oust Liz Cheney from Congress by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60356204:szOKGLhAN:m:1:2365227053:BDA3BA8A31A21E81E1A7846A5944A22B:r).**

Matt Gaetz

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Happy Juneteenth!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina for Oregon
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter,

Yesterday, I joined the Democratic Party of Oregon's Black Caucus and hundreds of community members to celebrate Juneteenth.

Tina for Oregon [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TK_Email_Juneteenth.jpeg]

Now a state and federal holiday, Juneteenth commemorates the emancipation of enslaved people in the United States, while also celebrating the freedom, dignity, and contributions made by Black Americans.

In Oregon, a beloved community leader named Clara Peoples organized the first Juneteenth celebration in the Portland shipyards in 1945. In 1972, she helped bring forth Portland’s first official Juneteenth parade and public celebration.

I want to thank her family and all of the community leaders who have carried on this tradition for decades, including coordinating this year's 50th anniversary. What an inspiring, joyful weekend in communities all across our state.

Let today be a reminder of the importance of the fight for freedom and human dignity — and a recognition that it's up to all of us to keep fighting every day for real equality, real justice, and real opportunities for success for everyone.

Thank you, and I hope you have a Happy Juneteenth!

Tina
Tina for Oregon
3321 SE 20th
Portland, OR 97202

name: Gwen Moore (personal)
subject: Let’s celebrate our second Independence Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers,

On June 19, 1865, Union soldiers arrived in Texas and declared that more than 250,000 enslaved Black people were free.

My home city of Milwaukee has been celebrating Juneteenth since 1971. In fact, it was one of the first northern cities to celebrate this important moment in history and one of the oldest Juneteenth celebrations in the nation. It is important that we remember this Juneteenth not only because of the cruel legacy of slavery but also because it serves as way for everyone to learn, remember, and counter ongoing racial inequities in the justice system and aspire to our nation's unfinished business to guarantee liberty and justice for all. Juneteenth is truly a day for all of America to celebrate.

Unfortunately, we still have a long way to go. According to a Pew Research survey, about a third of Black adults said they worried every day or almost every day that they might be threatened or attacked because of their race or ethnicity. The survey was conducted a month before the race-based shooting at a predominately black grocery store in Buffalo.

Congress passed The Juneteenth National Independence Day Act in June 2021, a day after the Senate passed the bill with unanimous consent . Equality and freedom are principles that we should all agree on.

Together #WeRepresent,

-Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!
FB: https://www.facebook.com/GwenMooreforCongress
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Gwen4Congress
IG: https://www.instagram.com/gwenmooreforcongress/

About Gwen: the first African American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on Jan. 4, 2005. She served in the WI State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the WI State Assembly from 1989-1992.

Chip in: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenjune22

Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
Gwen Moore for Congress
P.O. Box 16646
c/o Evans & Katz
Milwaukee, WI 53216
United States

name: Susan Wild
subject: Reflections on Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
As we remember this historic moment, we must also grapple with the inequity and racism that persists in our country today.

| Peter,

Today is Juneteenth, a day to commemorate the emancipation of enslaved people in the United States. As we remember this historic moment, we must also grapple with the inequity and racism that persists in our country today.

In the past two years, the United States and especially White Americans have engaged in frank conversations about racism in an unprecedented and long-overdue way, as the number of unarmed Black Americans who are killed because of the color of their skin grows every day — including the recent mass shooting in Buffalo carried out by a white supremacist in a majority-Black neighborhood.

**As an elected official and someone who was raised to work for equal rights for everyone, I am committed to supporting our Black communities and finding solutions. If you, like me, want to take action to be a part of the solution,[_I encourage you to consider donating to the NAACP to support their fight for civil rights today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46716173/351464975/304804557?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220619-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTc1ZDhlNi0wMGYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRkVKZqL98r1BJ6iPEVpz43LRfnHYsJOYBjGCwCmonE=)**

In solidarity,
Susan

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Feliz día de los Padres
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46716194/351465191/316559552?refcode=fl_email_na_20220619fathersday_gv_od30_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzA3MzE0Zi0wMWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DsHriWF_5VX_IevckuMqenjPP9Pp7xD51iEsSvIeiTk=)
---
Friend, Today, on Father’s Day, we celebrate and show appreciation to the fathers, grandfathers, and father-figures who’ve shaped us in life. I’d like to share a couple of stories about my father that influenced who I am today. My father grew up in a working-class family in Chihuahua and worked through school in Cd. Juarez to earn an engineering degree at the Instituto Tecnologico de Cd. Juarez to eventually work in the maquiladoras. His hard work and sacrifice are part of the reason I’m in this country today doing what I do. When I was little, my father took me and my brother fishing in the Rio Grande near Hatch, NM, for the first time. The first day we were there, my father was harassed and taken into jail for “identification” by the U.S. Border Patrol. I sat at the Sheriff’s office in Truth or Consequences, just wanting to go back home. When my father was released, **he told me that the river belonged to everyone, and that we belonged in this country.** We went back that night and I caught my first fish, and we camped under the stars. My father’s resiliency has always stuck with me. His efforts to pass these cherished outdoor traditions down to me and show me the beauty of nature inspired me to pass them on to New Mexican youth and work to conserve our public lands for future generations. I am the outdoorsman I am today because of mi Papá. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46716195/351465192/316559552?refcode=fl_email_na_20220619fathersday_gv_od30_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzA3MzE0Zi0wMWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DsHriWF_5VX_IevckuMqenjPP9Pp7xD51iEsSvIeiTk=)
---
Another time as a teenager, I helped my father make hundreds of burritos on Christmas Eve. That night, we handed out those burritos to those less fortunate, with no place to stay and nothing to eat, in the streets of Cd. Juarez. My father always taught me to give back and to think of those in need, which is what fuels my public service to this day.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46716196/351465193/316559552?refcode=fl_email_na_20220619fathersday_gv_od30_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzA3MzE0Zi0wMWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DsHriWF_5VX_IevckuMqenjPP9Pp7xD51iEsSvIeiTk=)
---
My father embodies selflessness and service to others. He has taught me so much, and still carries me in so many ways! He lives in San Carlos, Sonora, where he serves his local church and his community by delivering food and services to the sick and elderly. While I can’t spend this day with him, I’m so thankful for his presence in my life.
I’m also fondly remembering my abuelo Javier Bañuelos today. He moved our family from El Remolino, Zacatecas to Cd. Juarez for the promise of a better life of on the border. He learned to fix TVs and opened up a TV repair shop that my whole family worked in. He is dearly missed but never forgotten.

clean_body: | = Friend, Today, on Father’s Day, we celebrate and show appreciation to the fathers, grandfathers, and father-figures who’ve shaped us in life. I’d like to share a couple of stories about my father that influenced who I am today. My father grew up in a working-class family in Chihuahua and worked through school in Cd. Juarez to earn an engineering degree at the Instituto Tecnologico de Cd. Juarez to eventually work in the maquiladoras. His hard work and sacrifice are part of the reason I’m in this country today doing what I do. When I was little, my father took me and my brother fishing in the Rio Grande near Hatch, NM, for the first time. The first day we were there, my father was harassed and taken into jail for “identification” by the U.S. Border Patrol. I sat at the Sheriff’s office in Truth or Consequences, just wanting to go back home. When my father was released, he told me that the river belonged to everyone, and that we belonged in this country. We went back that night and I caught my first fish, and we camped under the stars. My father’s resiliency has always stuck with me. His efforts to pass these cherished outdoor traditions down to me and show me the beauty of nature inspired me to pass them on to New Mexican youth and work to conserve our public lands for future generations. I am the outdoorsman I am today because of mi Papá. | = Another time as a teenager, I helped my father make hundreds of burritos on Christmas Eve. That night, we handed out those burritos to those less fortunate, with no place to stay and nothing to eat, in the streets of Cd. Juarez. My father always taught me to give back and to think of those in need, which is what fuels my public service to this day. = My father embodies selflessness and service to others. He has taught me so much, and still carries me in so many ways! He lives in San Carlos, Sonora, where he serves his local church and his community by delivering food and services to the sick and elderly. While I can’t spend this day with him, I’m so thankful for his presence in my life. I’m also fondly remembering my abuelo Javier Bañuelos today. He moved our family from El Remolino, Zacatecas to Cd. Juarez for the promise of a better life of on the border. He learned to fix TVs and opened up a TV repair shop that my whole family worked in. He is dearly missed but never forgotten. = On this Father’s Day, I hope you are able to spend some quality time with your loved ones. Feliz día de los Padres! — Gabe = | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: Juneteenth

body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc619_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc619_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Today, we celebrate Juneteenth, an incredibly important time in our history, where we reflect on the value of freedom. As we honor this day, I think about how far this country has come in the journey toward racial justice and even more so, how far we still have to go.
Outdated policies have historically and systemically excluded people of color from economic opportunities, subjected them to discrimination and a racist criminal justice system, and denied them basic rights. Many institutions in our country are systemically racist, and we continue to feel their unfair impacts today. This is why [https://www.victoriaforcongress.com/racialjustice] I will continue to FIGHT HARD FOR JUSTICE and equality.

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.

She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable. That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families. Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward. Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [] DONATE [] [] www.VictoriaForCongress.com [] [] Facebook [] || Twitter [] || Instagram [] || TikTok [] Victoria for Congress P.O. name: Brianna Mast
subject: Will you help me with a surprise?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please don’t tell Brian I’m doing this. We need to keep it a secret!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbedovj6ohfaebcl3hvejmoqpifimt3lbh13hpgg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ucon2tb16tgb2phgspq68cljecoe5dlgs6rjep9km8on4o9nccpj0stkc6r7cptnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shlcooj1ddk6upb6phlc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5clhm6pb2cpgm49fg)
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| For those I haven’t met, my name is Brianna Mast. My husband Brian — now a Republican Congressman in Florida — was blown up in Afghanistan and lost both of his legs when a Taliban IED detonated beneath him.

Words cannot express how grateful I am that he is still with us today, and that he has been such an incredible father to our now four young children.

So, for Father’s Day, I want to do something special to show him how much he is appreciated, and I’m hoping you’ll help.

[**Will you join me in signing onto this Father’s Day card digitally below? I know this gesture is going to mean the world to Bria**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpd3b5ti9s6u92q05iqn7huapv6iiiiaqqpshqg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdhmaoj6c5h2bs)[** _n >>>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg13o14ps2h8bpt3s42i5mc05dourspvlh479t8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdhmaoj6c5h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeamn3nvcb78d1f9nomg3ii7qoi66mljd8r2c430_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdhmaoj6c5h2bs)
---
| With tomorrow being Father’s Day, I was thinking back to the day that I first learned about Brian’s near-fatal injuries on the battlefield in Afghanistan. There was a knock on the door at seven o’clock in the morning, and I could see men in uniform outside the window.

I feared the worst, and I didn’t know whether Brian was dead or alive. Our six month old son had just been born, and I began to fear that he would be growing up without a father in his life. It was the most nerve-wracking experience I can remember.

But by the grace of God, my worst fear didn’t come true. I was told that Brian wasn’t dead, just badly hurt after an IED detonated beneath him in Afghanistan, taking both of his legs and a finger... _but not his life._

This year has been perhaps the most painful for Brian since that moment though, which is why it’s so important to me that we support him this Father’s Day.

That’s because, just months ago, Joe Biden abandoned that very mission where I nearly lost Brian. It was hard for my husband and so many other Afghanistan veterans seeing the mission they sacrificed so much for end in such a heart-breaking manner.

[**_I’m hoping we can lift Brian’s spirits tomorrow on Father’s Day with this card >>> _**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8huu8pmui5skn4ntep60cli7q10fcmbnf02vmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdhmaoj6c5h2bs)
---
| [SIGN THE CARD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpj0b49hrq3rjnctkkhutq07hqptnd90r1983rtg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdhmaoj6c5h2bs "SIGN THE CARD")
---
| And for anyone who is able to step up with an additional gesture, I know that making a contribution to his re-election campaign today is also going to be a big weight off of Brian’s shoulders.

You see, Brian has been busy trying to get accountability for that failure in Afghanistan, and now as a result of redistricting - he is running for Congress in a brand-new district with thousands of voters who have never seen his name on a ballot before.

[**_So, your help in the form of a contribution of any amount would really make a huge impact for my husband at a critical time >>>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96tjohjkfd04lsq1g3l9o63tgbfb3msr45d7r8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdhmaoj6c5h2bs)
---
| [CHIP IN TO BRIAN’S RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3a4v6fb6ufk6s8bd5sua4gosl00vinnr7vrtp2o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdhmaoj6c5h2bs "CHIP IN TO BRIAN’S RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN HERE")
---
| Thank you for your help! _When I pass along the card, I’ll also be sure to tell Brian the names of all the supporters who pitched in to his campaign as well!_

Sincerely,
_Brianna Mast_
---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn23jd3masavs6g9osus1m355ke87n9imknkcs1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cdhmaoj6c5h2bs)
---

---
| | PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=107a822e25a14581ba218f80e0a5c366&_e=93rVIgYbD8Bf87M6I-M7mJsLy5rA769RJdlBqyrXrtjPvs_hdbxAArVCbTmdL15jnjLYgzsssYJwlp91LuOW8jg8WbZMkDfxbJ9YOlbgJXzvxj8R0zqbzrhTtOYAsDhuMf2RvRYoPl7z8jSpX4ZbNtxh9lncjMg1J3-YDN6RhWDKRfBvbAnCr20-f6Oz4HcDGw0SRrirStteuc24Zk08OO--D8K2sb57weHSBXpyI_b6o9xTPaH3VumdR0gMD4QaUOtd3sf1kNDsspvjly33ZnnKv-9pS3ruL5K-4Wrkp-Cl97pVZNYCofjS4Zv4k3JFyGLlv-z8YsxvqdhOB8pChnetm0uqF7LrxCs6Yh8FgKLmifC-Od3rWqUAGyOvctoHZnkxH-Osqzz33ki_Pi-By27oUGirSPOkXNx7LKu-kgUQhkxNZP1wmsIQpK2aCRp7B27BqHgDhbHO00nPSCvJdw%3D%3D)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=107a822e25a14581ba218f80e0a5c366&_e=93rVIgYbD8Bf87M6I-M7mJsLy5rA769RJdlBqyrXrtjPvs_hdbxAArVCbTmdL15jnjLYgzsssYJwlp91LuOW8jg8WbZMkDfxbJ9YOlbgJXzvxj8R0zqbzrhTtOYAsDhuMf2RvRYoPl7z8jSpX4ZbNtxh9lncjMg1J3-YDN6RhWDKRfBvbAnCr20-f6Oz4HcDGw0SRrirStteuc24Zk08OO--D8K2sb57weHSBXpyI_b6o9xTPaH3VumdR0gMD4QaYSz4iFDuRfOdrOYxiGJ8A3u6yvYD3hIDeoglMMQiMIt1PAxOI3ShQZ6exMfFmrG7iuQmAc0w0rU0RMc2zm8GmJGPxpV5KilhwUZbwKf3IkJICg9RkD8qlDQQI5g6MzzG6-ONbQfvwX8D0ew5XKM75LNIfmjqN2B6lljZhl8MHObmVkJnSsYefvKU3Be722WA3q2pV_FtblpNnoueUt5T4w%3D%3D) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=107a822e25a14581ba218f80e0a5c366&_e=93rVIgYbD8Bf87M6I-M7mJsLy5rA769RJdlBqyrXrtjPvs_hdbxAArVCbTmdL15jnjLYgzsssYJwlp91LuOW8jg8WbZMkDfxbJ9YOlbgJXzvxj8R0zqbzrhTtOYAsDhuMf2RvRYoPl7z8jSpX4ZbNtxh9lncjMg1J3-YDN6RhWDKRfBvbAnCr20-f6Oz4HcDGw0SRrirStteuc24Zk08OO--D8K2sb57weHSBXpyI_b6o9xTPaH3VumdR0gMD4QaPC3Zg8_9-Uysimzk8uS1Lt4uO6m19qnklNjjH6Of4Qn0cFHBRF1VXhqhANN8UhFMsHyPYu6JVpesTJit_gGCU_M1BW_l3alBAlzGyoSqF6XAOmfP5ajoIqj54hlx8WN65rkHl3wqFQ_QuoEfh94oCYAco0go_-uFrt2La0LtEotNfmXObNpCLIvPQn-2j6BjO5l-AhtbQgpYVb7AqkfdSQ%3D%3D)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
There is still much more work to do.
#

Friend -
Today marks 157 years since the news of the Emancipation Proclamation, which ended slavery in the United States, finally reached the remaining enslaved African Americans in Galveston, Texas — two and a half years after it was issued by President Abraham Lincoln.
There have been many collective actions to advance equality and justice for African Americans since that day. And there is still much more work to do.
We face a remarkable opportunity to make history here in 2022 — to acknowledge the hardships and indignities suffered by my ancestors but to assure them that their sacrifices were not in vain. In the ancestors’ despair, they were also believers that one day we would live in an America where opportunity is available to all.
That we are pushing for a fairer, more just America and where we elect people who look like all of North Carolina. This election, and all the many ways we work to make North Carolina stronger, we recommit ourselves to fighting for and standing up for the promise of our nation – that all Americans, regardless of race, gender, class, or creed, have the opportunity for prosperous, safe, and healthy lives.
We fight for civility, honor, and dignity and a nation of courage and integrity. Thank you for being with me in this fight.
– Cheri Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1081%2E357359%2EHiDezv). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1081%2E357359%2EHiDezv). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1081_357359_HiDezv&akid=1081%2E357359%2EHiDezv) today to help us make history.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My bill to lower your bill at the pump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Shell, Chevron, ExxonMobil, ConocoPhillips, and BP have increased their profits by over 300 percent in the first quarter of the year compared to 2021.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=390%2E5257348%2E4nMUFX)
When is enough, enough, Derek?
For the five biggest oil companies that have spent months gouging their customers at the pump, there appears to be no end in sight.
Shell, Chevron, ExxonMobil, ConocoPhillips, and BP have increased their profits by over 300 percent in the first quarter of the year compared to 2021. Even when oil prices have fallen, gas prices have hit new highs, leaving Americans struggling to pay the out-of-control prices at the pump.
$35 billion in profits in just three months. With gas costing $4.50 a gallon nationwide and well over $6 a gallon here in Los Angeles.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220619-federal-gas-tax.4IOnKI&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220619_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=390%2E5257348%2E4nMUFX)
_Gas prices are just too damn high. And I have a bill to lower them._ Here’s my plan:
I just introduced the _Federal Gas Tax Suspension and Windfall Profits Tax Act_ to suspend the federal gas tax of 18.3 cents per gallon through December 31, 2023.
My bill would create a new 50% tax on Big Oil’s windfall profits, that is, any profit they make well in excess of what they did in prior years. The effect of the windfall profits tax will be to keep revenue for the Highway Trust Fund neutral even while eliminating the gas tax on consumers, thereby providing immediate financial relief for commuters, and ensuring transportation projects like the ones just greenlit from the infrastructure law continue to move forward.
Essentially, lowering your gas prices, and making Big Oil pay for it.
[**Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my bill if you support suspending the federal gas tax and instituting a new 50% tax on Big Oil’s record profits to pay for it.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220619-federal-gas-tax.4IOnKI&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220619_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=390%2E5257348%2E4nMUFX)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220619-federal-gas-tax.4IOnKI&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220619_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=390%2E5257348%2E4nMUFX)
---
This is cut and dry, Derek. Congress must choose between the interests of commuters and the interests of Big Oil.
I know what side I’m on. And I think you do too.
[**Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my _Federal Gas Tax Suspension and Windfall Profits Tax Act_ today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220619-federal-gas-tax.4IOnKI&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220619_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=390%2E5257348%2E4nMUFX)
Thanks for raising your voice with me.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=390%2E5257348%2E4nMUFX) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=390%2E5257348%2E4nMUFX)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=390%2E5257348%2E4nMUFX)

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: Help me close the gap! 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Smiley for Washington, Inc
body:
No one thought this was possible

We're just three points behind in a state that NO ONE thought could flip this year

Hey Patriot, It's Tiffany Smiley, Conservative running for U.S. Senate.

**The latest polls show I'm JUST 3 POINTS behind my Democrat opponent: Career politician Patty Murray.**
| **[**RETIRE PATTY MURRAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619306:JaSVIqoN9:m:1:3299561967:D6F1987A1F6F11EFBF013706F401E40C:r)**
---

For a state that absolutely *no one* thought could flip in 2022, this is a monumental achievement. [**For the first time in 30 YEARS, we have a very real chance here to flip Washington****RED****.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619306:JaSVIqoN9:m:1:3299561967:D6F1987A1F6F11EFBF013706F401E40C:r)

Biden and Murray are outraising me by MILLIONS.

I'm counting on Patriots like you to help close the gap & make flipping Washington red a reality!

We've had 96% of grassroots supporters step up and chip in, we're just waiting on you, Patriot.

**[**EXPRESS DONATE $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619306:JaSVIqoN9:m:1:3299561967:D6F1987A1F6F11EFBF013706F401E40C:r)**
---

Murray is counting on coastal elites and DC insiders to bankroll her campaign, but I'm counting on everyday Conservatives like you. [_**Rush in any amount you can immediately to make a difference in this race.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619306:JaSVIqoN9:m:1:3299561967:D6F1987A1F6F11EFBF013706F401E40C:r)

Thanks for your help,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619306:JaSVIqoN9:m:1:3299561967:D6F1987A1F6F11EFBF013706F401E40C:r)

Tiffany Smiley

* * *

**Our country needs leadership, Friend.**
We need someone who will stand up and work to solve our nation's problems. I'm a proven leader, I've stood up to the DC bureaucrats at the VA to pave the way for ALL veterans to receive the care and treatment they deserve when they return home.
Our veterans are willing to pay the ultimate price for our everyday freedoms. But when they come back home, their service is often overlooked by our very own government.
After serving our nation and laying their lives on the line overseas, our veterans should **NOT** have to beg to get the care they deserve here at home. We need to do better for those who defend our nation, Friend.
**That is why I 'm running for Senate. **

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619307:JaSVIqoN9:m:1:3299561967:D6F1987A1F6F11EFBF013706F401E40C:r)

[**If you agree we need to stand up for our nation 's heroes, will you chip in to help me reach my major upcoming goal? I need your support, Friend!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619307:JaSVIqoN9:m:1:3299561967:D6F1987A1F6F11EFBF013706F401E40C:r)

**[**MEET MY IMPENDING DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60619307:JaSVIqoN9:m:1:3299561967:D6F1987A1F6F11EFBF013706F401E40C:r)**

I'm a proven leader, I've stood up to the DC bureaucrats at the VA to pave the way for ALL veterans to receive the care and treatment they deserve when they return home. Our veterans are willing to pay the ultimate price for our everyday freedoms. But when they come back home, their service is often overlooked by our very own government. After serving our nation and laying their lives on the line overseas, our veterans should NOT have to beg to get the care they deserve here at home. We need to do better for those who defend our nation, Friend. That is why I 'm running for Senate. ** Paid for by Smiley for Washington, Inc. PO Box 1058 Richland, WA, 99352 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 25, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-49136991185-echo7-797DBDB6DE16CDF2F1C7EC735FB24813@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

Today is Juneteenth, a time to commemorate the end of slavery in the
United States after the Civil War. As we honor the anniversary of Jubilee,
we recognize that this day requires more from us than mere recognition —
we must meet it with imagination and action.

Our deep obligation is to create a world fueled by justice and steeped in
equity. Juneteenth demands an acknowledgment of society’s failures,
remedied by nothing less than persistent, determined improvement.

In action, this commitment means we cannot accept when voter suppression
keeps citizens and their children in line for hours. We work to ensure
that no Georgian and no American is afraid to drop their kids off at
school, attend a religious service or go to the grocery store. We expand
access to mental and physical health care. We increase public safety and
reduce mass incarceration, address our failing prisons and enable the
successful return of citizens who have served their time.

We decry the practices of those who profit from Black misery and we must
build new systems that allow us to thrive.

Making that vision a reality will not be easy,
Derek. It requires admitting we
have real, endemic problems, while embracing that we have a spirit of
innovation matched with a heritage of communal care. On this day, we
celebrate our persistence — and our right to rise.

Sincerely,

Stacey

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1438?refcode=sa_em_220619_B1_Juneteenth_S1_T1_SYA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=677%2E1862389%2Ec_a-EN ]CONTRIBUTE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=677%2E1862389%2Ec_a-EN ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=677%2E1862389%2Ec_a-EN

Friend,

When I say the Florida governor’s race is as close as it gets, I mean it! Just take a look at some of the most recent polls that have me neck and neck with Ron DeSantis:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46717061/351469298/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220619_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGI1ZjZlNy0wNmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjZfhB5c1UNORNxYkUD4PwjgjWV5Cd_Sr_lukiZW8Es=)

**_[With the race this close, every dollar we raise is going to make an enormous difference. Will you pitch in now to help me fight back against DeSantis’s wealthy backers and win this race in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46717062/351469299/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220619_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGI1ZjZlNy0wNmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjZfhB5c1UNORNxYkUD4PwjgjWV5Cd_Sr_lukiZW8Es=)_**

Here’s the thing: The _entire_ country is counting on us to stop DeSantis before he wins a second term and uses it as a launching pad for a campaign for president. The far-right, billionaire backed agenda he’s been pushing has been a DISASTER for Florida — and we can’t afford for him to take it to the White House, too.

He’s against women’s freedom to choose, voting rights restoration, and common-sense gun safety laws, and he’s outlawed the very mention of LGBTQ+ people in the classroom. Plus, he’s been funneling tax refunds to some of the very same corporate donors who are bankrolling his campaign. And let’s not forget the _disastrous_ mismanagement of COVID-19 that led to thousands of preventable deaths in our communities.

If DeSantis gets to take that agenda to the White House, our country is in big trouble. But the good news is we can stop his presidential campaign before it ever gets off the ground by defeating him right here, right now, in the Florida governor’s race. And I need your grassroots support to do it.

subject: Happy Father’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Peter, I couldn’t resist reaching out today to wish all the fathers a very happy Father’s Day!

As you probably know, my husband - Scott Baugh - is running for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District.

He is so dedicated to improving life for families in our community, and I think that’s because of how equally dedicated he is to his most important job as a father!
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=2ad2649639&e=8a657725d1)
---
| So, today, I want to do something nice for him, and I’m hoping you’ll help me with a surprise...

[Will you sign a Father’s Day card to Scott to let him know how much we all appreciate him? >>>](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=ab4e52d125&e=8a657725d1)
---
| [SIGN THE CARD HERE](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=016e8110dc&e=8a657725d1 "SIGN THE CARD HERE")
---
| I know he will greatly appreciate the gesture.

More importantly, though, I hope all the dads out there have a great day! Thank you for all you do!

Sincerely,
Wendy Baugh

Supporting Ted is our only hope to flip the Senate and keep North Carolina RED. If we want to take back America in 2022, we have to support Republican allies across the country. name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: Corrected: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc619_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc619_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Today, we celebrate Juneteenth, an incredibly important time in our history, where we reflect on the value of freedom. As we honor this day, I think about how far this country has come in the journey toward racial justice and even more so, how far we still have to go.
Outdated policies have historically and systemically excluded African Americans from economic opportunities, subjected them to discrimination and a racist criminal justice system, and denied them basic rights. Many institutions in our country are systemically racist, and we continue to feel their unfair impacts today. This is why [https://www.victoriaforcongress.com/racialjustice] I will continue to FIGHT HARD FOR JUSTICE and equality.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=misc619 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=misc619]
Victoria

If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=misc619a_10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=misc619a_25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=misc619a_50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=misc619a_100]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc619b]

---
When our dad launched his campaign for governor over a year ago, it was hard to know what to expect and how our lives would change. Our dad has always been our hero, but this campaign has shown us that he serves as an inspiration for so many Marylanders who want a better future for themselves and their families. **We couldn’t be more proud that he’s running to be our next governor.**
Out of all the things our dad has taught us, one thing that really stands out is how he always perseveres when the going gets tough. Despite the many challenges he’s faced throughout his life, our dad has never wavered in his passion and commitment to promoting equity and fighting for every kid in every school to have a chance to succeed.
And through it all, he has always been there for us as the best dad we could ever ask for. From coaching our little league softball team, to clapping the loudest at our school plays and track meets, to never missing an opportunity to deliver a corny dad joke, Dad has always been there. He has worked so hard to give us every opportunity to thrive and succeed, and we have no doubt that as governor he will do the same for every Marylander.
[_**Join us in wishing our dad a Happy Father’s Day by signing our card right now >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46717399/351472726/-1307687168?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTYyOGY5ZS0wYWYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93pQAGH1V2zqTGNsbrpUQLrC9u6l2cuJfH43HSrNMok=&emci=a0628f9e-0af0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ae628f9e-0af0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
We appreciate your support of our Dad’s campaign so much. And to all who are celebrating, Happy Father’s Day!
All the best,
Mireya & Amina

clean_body: Hey, Peter – Mireya & Amina here! We’re John King’s daughters and we wanted all of you to join us in wishing our amazing dad Happy Father’s Day. | = | Hey, Peter — Mireya & Amina here! We’re John King’s daughters and we wanted all of you to join us in wishing our amazing dad Happy Father’s Day. | | When our dad launched his campaign for governor over a year ago, it was hard to know what to expect and how our lives would change. Our dad has always been our hero, but this campaign has shown us that he serves as an inspiration for so many Marylanders who want a better future for themselves and their families. We couldn’t be more proud that he’s running to be our next governor. Out of all the things our dad has taught us, one thing that really stands out is how he always perseveres when the going gets tough. Despite the many challenges he’s faced throughout his life, our dad has never wavered in his passion and commitment to promoting equity and fighting for every kid in every school to have a chance to succeed. And through it all, he has always been there for us as the best dad we could ever ask for. From coaching our little league softball team, to clapping the loudest at our school plays and track meets, to never missing an opportunity to deliver a corny dad joke, Dad has always been there. He has worked so hard to give us every opportunity to thrive and succeed, and we have no doubt that as governor he will do the same for every Marylander. We appreciate your support of our Dad’s campaign so much. And to all who are celebrating, Happy Father’s Day! All the best, Mireya & Amina * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . subject: Psst. We still need your help...

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46717498/351473931/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE2YzgwOS0wYmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGDu7rBhjPKtkE6FphwHurIIrjpCLOEqWYqp32bytNY=)
Team, We’ll make this quick so you can get back to enjoying your weekend — Today is Father’s Day, and our dad is not easy to impress. Finding the right gift is always a challenge for us, but we think we came up with a good one. **This year, we set a goal to have 200 of his dedicated supporters sign our Father’s Day card for him.** We want to surprise him with a birthday card signed by folks like you and the people he serves in the Senate. Our dad has been fighting for other working dads, guardians, and father figures across Colorado and the country by expanding the monthly Child Tax Credit, improving our public school system, and helping to create jobs that allow parents to keep roofs over their heads and food on the table. And Dad is always there for us; cooking dinner, answering our calls and texts (no matter how inconvenient); and when needed, helping with our homework. **t’s not too late to help us reach our goal — so please take a moment to sign our card and help wish our dad a happy Father’s Day.** | | **[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46717499/351473932/1803391826?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220619_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWE2YzgwOS0wYmYwLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGDu7rBhjPKtkE6FphwHurIIrjpCLOEqWYqp32bytNY=&emci=6d42ba0d-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=eaa6c809-0bf0-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1295540)**

Thanks so much and talk soon,
Caroline, Halina, and Anne
